英文原文: Mag Arba sits on grassy downs overlooking Llyn Tywal, the dark lake. Villagers have planted flax in the boggy dales between the hills.
中文译文: 马格阿尔巴坐落于草坡之上，俯瞰着黑暗之湖林泰瓦尔。村民们在山丘间的沼泽谷地中种植亚麻。

英文原文: Swenryn gives its name to the waterfall that cascades down the cliffs at the eastern edge of the Uchalion. Horses graze in lush pastures fed by the mists.
中文译文: 斯温林之名源自乌卡利昂东缘悬崖上倾泻而下的瀑布。马匹在雾气滋养的丰美牧场上吃草。

英文原文: Seordas sits in the lowlands at the eastern edge of the Battanian lands, at the foot of the Uchalion's cliffs. The land is watered by the tributaries of the Myr River and the soil is rich, but in wartime there are few natural protections against the maraudings of Sturgian and imperial raiders.
中文译文: 塞奥达斯位于巴旦尼亚领地东缘的低地，乌卡利昂悬崖脚下。此地受米尔河支流灌溉，土壤肥沃，但战时几乎无天然屏障抵御斯特吉亚与帝国掠夺者的侵袭。

英文原文: Pen Cannoc sits on a promontory overlooking the Etircomb pass as it plunges from the Uchalion plateau into the Vlandian lowlands. Legends speak of the water-nymphs who live in springs that form in the cliffside, luring travellers and invaders to their deaths, except on those rare occasions when they fall in love with a hero and grant him victory and blessings. Certainly the people of this region have learned respect for the perils of the Etircomb, where a small misstep on slippery stone can cast one off a precipice into the gorge below.
中文译文: 彭卡诺克坐落于一处海岬之上，俯瞰着从乌卡利昂高原直坠弗兰迪亚低地的埃蒂尔科姆隘口。传说悬崖上的泉水中居住着水宁芙，她们引诱旅人与入侵者坠崖身亡，除非偶尔爱上某位英雄，便赐予他胜利与祝福。此地民众深知埃蒂尔科姆之险——在湿滑的岩石上稍有失足，便会坠入下方峡谷。

英文原文: Durn sits just below the crags that form the crest of the Etircomb, the steep valley that climbs from the Vlandian coastal lowlands to the Uchalion massif. Villagers scrape mud from mountain creekbeds, carting it up the winding paths to the town of Pen Cannoc perched on the cliff above them.
中文译文: 杜恩位于埃蒂尔科姆山脊的峭壁之下——这条陡峭的山谷从弗兰迪亚沿海低地攀升至乌卡利昂山体。村民们从山间溪流中刮取泥浆，沿蜿蜒小径运往上方悬崖上的彭卡诺克镇。

英文原文: Gainseth sits in dense woods that grow near the stronghold of Pen Cannoc. Villagers collect mud from the marshy ground for sale to the potters of Pen Cannoc.
中文译文: 盖恩塞斯位于彭卡诺克要塞附近的密林之中。村民们从沼泽地采集泥浆，售予彭卡诺克的陶工。

英文原文: Fenon Etir lies in the Etircomb, the steep valley that leads from the Vlandian coastal lowlands to the Uchalion massif. The trails to the village pass by mounds of slag, the detritus from centuries of mining the iron-rich ores of the nearby hills, exposed by the creeks that run down from the heights.
中文译文: 费农埃蒂尔位于埃蒂尔科姆——这条陡峭的山谷从弗兰迪亚沿海低地通往乌卡利昂山体。通往村庄的小径旁堆满矿渣，那是数世纪以来开采附近山丘富铁矿床留下的废料，被高处流下的溪流冲刷而出。

英文原文: Inveth sits where the River Etir forms from streams that tumble down the Uchalion massif before reaching the coastal lowlands, where they feed into the Trand. The surrounding hillsides support the growing of wheat.
中文译文: 因韦斯坐落于埃蒂尔河形成之处——河水由乌卡利昂山体倾泻而下的溪流汇聚而成，随后流入沿海低地，汇入特兰德河。周围的山坡适宜种植小麦。

英文原文: Usek sits atop an escarpment of the Akkan Hills on the eastern shores of Lake Tanaesis, which the Khuzaits call the Tanaz Sea. The villagers, who until recently were nomads, raise sheep known for the long, fine wool.
中文译文: 乌塞克位于塔纳埃西斯湖（库赛特人称塔纳兹海）东岸的阿坎丘陵崖顶之上。村民们不久前还是游牧者，如今饲养着以长而精细的羊毛著称的绵羊。

英文原文: The village of Esme and its surrounding hamlets lie on the landward side of the Akkan Hills on the Devseg plateau, prime grazing lands for the horses of the Khuzaits and their confederates.
中文译文: 埃斯梅村及其周边村落位于德夫塞格高原阿坎丘陵的内陆一侧，是库赛特人及其盟友马匹的优良牧场。

英文原文: Akiser sits in the southern reaches of the Akkan Hills. The land here is exceptionally broken and weathered, revealing seams of iron in the sides of the gullies and ravines.
中文译文: 阿基瑟位于阿坎丘陵的南部。此地地势异常破碎且经风化，沟壑与峡谷的侧壁露出铁矿脉。

英文原文: The village of Hakkun sits beneath the escarpment of the Akkan Hills. The people of these parts have long mined silver from the mountains, a trade that the Khuzait khans were happy to encourage when they conquered this region.
中文译文: 哈库恩村位于阿坎丘陵的崖壁之下。此地民众世代从山中开采银矿，库赛特可汗征服该地区后，对此贸易乐见其成。

英文原文: Tepes sits in forested lowlands between the Devseg plateau and the lake that the Khuzaits call the Tanaz Sea. This district specializes in the harvest of timber, which is dragged by oxen to the water and then floated to the lake towns.
中文译文: 特佩斯位于德夫塞格高原与库赛特人称为塔纳兹海的湖泊之间的森林低地。此地区专门从事木材采伐，木材由牛拖至水边，再浮运至湖滨城镇。

英文原文: Khimli sits in a basin in the Devseg plateau. Though this land is dry most of the year, it experiences winter snowfalls and muddy springs. Fine clay can be collected from the pools left by the snowmelt and the rains.
中文译文: 基姆利位于德夫塞格高原的一处盆地中。此地一年中大部分时间干旱，但冬季有降雪，春季泥泞。融雪与雨水形成的水洼中可采集到优质黏土。

英文原文: Dinar lies in the far north of the Khuzait confederacy, along the Karakaz River. Here, tribes recently arrived from the steppe have intermarried with refugees pushed south from the Jumne valley by recent Nord expansion. The villagers herd sheep out on the open grassland of the steppe.
中文译文: 迪纳尔位于库赛特联盟最北端，沿卡拉卡兹河分布。此地新近从草原迁来的部落与因诺德人扩张而从尤姆内河谷南下的难民通婚。村民们在开阔的草原牧场上放牧绵羊。

英文原文: Karahalli lies in the far north of the Khuzait confederacy, in borderlands contested by Sturgians and Nords. Though the winters are cold, the spring grasses are fine grazing for the local sheep, whose thick wool protects them from the region's piercing winds.
中文译文: 卡拉哈利位于库赛特联盟最北端，是斯特吉亚人与诺德人争夺的边境地带。尽管冬季寒冷，春季的牧草却是当地绵羊的优良饲料，其厚实的羊毛足以抵御此地的刺骨寒风。

英文原文: The villagers of Simira raise cattle by the grassy shores of the Tiagys River, known to the Khuzaits as the Teyagh. The river here still runs fast after its descent from the hills, and in springtime the villagers have learned to watch closely for signs of a flood that will force them to get their herds to higher ground.
中文译文: 西米拉的村民们在蒂亚吉斯河（库赛特人称泰亚格河）的草岸上饲养牛群。此段河流从山丘奔流而下，水流湍急，春季村民们须时刻警惕洪水迹象，以便及时将牛群赶至高地。

英文原文: Erzenur sits alongside the east branch of the Tiagys River. It is known in the local dialect as the Kizil Teyagh from the strong reddish tint in the iron-rich sediments borne in its currents. Villagers will often divert the waters to wash away soil and expose new seams of ore.
中文译文: 埃尔泽努尔位于蒂亚吉斯河东支流畔。当地土语称其为“基齐尔泰亚格”，因水流中富含铁质的沉积物呈深红色。村民们常引水冲刷土壤，以暴露新的矿脉。

英文原文: Kaysar sits in the north and east of the lands ruled by the Khuzaits, in the valley of the Karakaz River. This district is snowbound for much of the year, but villagers still raise herds of cattle bred to withstand the icy winds coming downriver from the north.
中文译文: 凯萨尔位于库赛特领地东北部，卡拉卡兹河流域。此地一年中大部分时间冰雪覆盖，但村民们仍饲养着能抵御北方顺流而下的寒风的牛群。

英文原文: Payam lies alongside the Davana River in the cold north of the Khuzait lands, not far from where it joins with the Karakaz and runs down to the sea. Though the land is snowbound much of the year, the villagers sow wheat and barley as soon as the melt starts, taking in a good crop before the autumn.
中文译文: 帕亚姆坐落于库赛特领地北境的达瓦纳河畔，距其与卡拉卡兹河交汇入海处不远。此地虽终年雪封，但村民在融雪伊始便播种小麦与大麦，赶在秋日前收获丰产。

英文原文: Baltakhand, the Fortress of the Axe, was settled by the Iltanlar, mountain-dwelling cousins of the Khuzaits. Centuries ago their beys descended into the plains and created the fortress here that guards the portages of Iltan, the network of lakes and rivers that divides the Sturgian lands from the Khuzaits' realm. Bitter winters protected them from the reach of the Empire, but no blast of wind was cutting enough to stop the horsemen of Khan Urkhun, who 40 years ago forced this town to submit to the khanate.
中文译文: 巴尔塔汗，斧之堡垒，由库赛特人的山地远亲伊尔坦拉尔所建。数百年前，他们的贝伊下山入平原，筑此要塞，守护伊尔坦的陆运通道——那片分隔斯特吉亚与库赛特疆域的湖河网络。凛冽寒冬曾使其免受帝国染指，但四十年前，乌尔昆可汗的铁骑踏破风雪，迫使此城臣服于汗庭。

英文原文: Fisnar sits in the grasslands east of the Karakaz River. Snow-bound for much of the year, the spring grasses nonetheless sustain sizeable herds of sheep, the thick wool of which protects them from the bitter winter cold.
中文译文: 菲斯纳尔坐落在卡拉卡兹河以东的草原上。虽一年中多数时光雪覆大地，春草仍滋养着大群绵羊，其厚毛足以抵御严冬酷寒。

英文原文: Ulaan sits where the land gently rises from the valley of the Karakaz River to the slopes of the Sulan Dag. The villagers, nomads who have recently been forced by the khans to settle, have learned to grow flax for their livelihoods.
中文译文: 乌兰位于卡拉卡兹河谷缓缓抬升至苏兰达格山麓之处。村民本是游牧之民，近年被可汗强令定居，如今已学会种植亚麻以谋生计。

英文原文: Kuruluk sits in the shadow of the peak known as Bars Dag. Though this valley is snowbound for much of the year, steppe ponies thrive on the spring grasses and in the winter dig through the snow for food, their thick coats protecting them from the icy blasts of wind. Villagers keep watch to protect them from the leopards for which the mountain is named.
中文译文: 库鲁卢克坐落在名为巴尔达格的山峰阴影之下。此谷虽常年雪封，草原矮马却以春草为生，冬日刨雪觅食，厚鬃抵御寒风。村民需警惕以山为名的雪豹，守护马群。

英文原文: Asalig sits at the foot of the Sulan Dag mountains, dividing the northern Khuzait lands from the sparsely populated steppe to the east. Villagers raise horses in the lower slopes, keeping watch for the leopards that descend from the high peaks in the winter, when the game is scarce.
中文译文: 阿萨利格位于苏兰达格山麓，分隔库赛特北境与东部人烟稀少的草原。村民在山坡低处养马，警惕冬日因猎物稀少而下山的雪豹。

英文原文: The town that the Khuzaits know as Akkalat, the White Fortress, was built by the fearsome Padishah Hoshtar on one of his periodic attempts to conquer the Devseg. For decades the sacred flame that burned from the top of the citadel symbolized his suzerainty over the tribes here. But the Padishah's realm like the Empire is on the defensive and has retreated to the east. Today the Khan's horsetail banners fly in its place.
中文译文: 库赛特人称之为阿卡拉特的城镇，即白堡，由可怖的帕迪沙·霍什塔尔在其数次征服德夫塞格的征途中建造。数十年来，城堡顶端燃烧的圣火象征着他对此地部族的宗主权。但帕迪沙的疆域如同帝国一般，已转入守势，退往东方。如今，可汗的马尾旗飘扬其上。

英文原文: Karakalat lies at the southern end of the Akkan Hills. Until recently, this land was dominated by nomads, and it is still famous as a breeding ground for horses.
中文译文: 卡拉卡拉特位于阿坎丘陵南端。直至近日，此地仍为游牧民族所主宰，至今仍以育马之地闻名。

英文原文: Kohi Ajik lies in a valley at the foot of the so-called Lover's Mountain, from which its name derives. To its east spring the headwaters of the Ozu River, one of the sources of the mighty Tiagys.
中文译文: 科希阿吉克坐落于所谓“情人山”山麓的谷地中，其名源于此山。其东侧是奥祖河的源头，亦是强大的蒂亚吉斯河的发源之一。

英文原文: Gereden lies amid the foothills of the Kohi Rohini, the mountains of the dawn, near the headwaters of the Kizil Tayegh River. The clay from this region, known for its reddish tint, is highly valued by the artisans of Odokh and other nearby towns.
中文译文: 盖雷登位于黎明山脉科希罗希尼的山麓丘陵中，靠近克孜尔塔耶格河的源头。此地的黏土以微红色调著称，深受奥多克及附近城镇工匠的珍视。

英文原文: Kiraz lies in a basin at the southern end of the Devseg plateau. Until recently, this land was dominated by nomads, and the people here still make their living by raising sheep.
中文译文: 基拉兹位于德夫塞格高原南端的盆地中。直至近日，此地仍为游牧民族所主宰，当地人至今仍以牧羊为生。

英文原文: Makeb sits on the northern tip of Lake Tanaesis, Tanaz in the steppe tongue. This city has long been ruled by petty khans and shahs, who collect tolls from traders forced to haul their boats around the rapids. The last of those rulers was beheaded by Urkhun himself after he refused a demand of tribute, after which the ruling family of the Khuzaits seized this town for themselves.
中文译文: 马凯布坐落在塔纳埃西斯湖（草原语称塔纳兹）的北端。此城长久以来由小可汗与沙阿统治，他们向被迫拖船过急流的商人收取过路费。最后一位统治者因拒绝纳贡而被乌尔昆本人斩首，此后库赛特统治家族将此城据为己有。

英文原文: The fishing village of Shapeshte sits on a bay in Lake Tanaesis, which the Khuzaits call the Tanaz Sea. Carp and catfish were introduced to the gentle murky waters of the lakeshore back when these lands were controlled by the Empire, and today make up the majority of the fishermen's catch.
中文译文: 渔村沙佩什特位于塔纳埃西斯湖（库赛特人称塔纳兹海）的一处海湾。当此地尚属帝国统治时，鲤鱼与鲶鱼被引入湖畔温和浑浊的水域，如今构成渔民渔获的大部。

英文原文: Hanekhy sits atop a northern spur of the Akkan Hills. Each day, the villagers climb down winding paths to tend their wheatfields in the plains below.
中文译文: 哈内基坐落在阿坎丘陵北端的一处山嘴上。每日，村民沿蜿蜒小径下山，照料下方平原的麦田。

英文原文: The village of Mazen sits on the northern end of Lake Tanaesis, which the Khuzaits call the Tanaz Sea. The northern winters here are tempered by the lake, and the villagers raise mulberry trees here to feed silkworms.
中文译文: 马曾村位于塔纳埃西斯湖（库赛特人称塔纳兹海）北端。北方的冬日因湖水而温和，村民在此种植桑树以养蚕。

英文原文: Ortongard sits near the eastern edges of the Devseg plateau. The land is dry for most of the year but offers rich grazing in the spring. Founded by Darshi-speaking merchants, it made its wealth buying horses, sheep and cattle from the surrounding herding villages and sending them west to the markets of the Empire in huge drives, accompanied by guards to ward off raiders from the steppes. Neither its walls nor its mercenary armies could withstand the coming of Khan Urkhun, however, who granted it to the Khergit clan in recognition of their valor.
中文译文: 奥通加德坐落在德夫塞格高原东缘附近。此地一年中多数时节干旱，但春季水草丰美。由达尔希语商人所建，他们从周边牧村购买马匹、绵羊与牛群，组成大规模商队，由护卫护送以抵御草原劫匪，西运至帝国市场。然而，无论是城墙还是雇佣军，都无法抵挡乌尔昆可汗的降临，他将此城赐予赫吉特氏族，以表彰其勇武。

英文原文: Omrotok sits at the foot of the Sulun Dag mountains, which mark the eastern border of the Devseg plateau. Villagers go to the nearby woods to harvest one of the Devseg's few sources of timber.
中文译文: 奥姆罗托克坐落在苏伦达格山麓，此山标志着德夫塞格高原的东界。村民前往附近林地，采集德夫塞格为数不多的木材资源。

英文原文: Ransam lies in the southern plains of the Devseg plateau. Villagers, who not long ago still lived a nomadic lifestyle, specialize in the rearing of horses.
中文译文: 兰萨姆坐落于德夫塞格高原的南部平原。不久前仍过着游牧生活的村民们，专精于马匹的饲养。

英文原文: Mivanjan sits near an escarpment of the Akkan Hills, which marks the western border of the Devseg plateau. Villagers, who not long ago still lived a nomadic lifestyle, raise sheep in the foothills.
中文译文: 米万詹位于阿坎丘陵的一处悬崖附近，该丘陵标志着德夫塞格高原的西部边界。不久前仍过着游牧生活的村民们，在山麓地带牧羊。

英文原文: Urunjan sits near the eastern edge of the Devseg plateau, at the foot of the Sulan Dag mountains. Villagers raise cattle here that are bred to withstand both the hot summers and freezing winters.
中文译文: 乌鲁尼扬坐落于德夫塞格高原东部边缘，苏兰达格山脚下。村民们在此饲养的牛群，经过培育既能耐受炎夏，也能抵御寒冬。

英文原文: Chaikand sits by the reed-marshes on the edge of Lake Tanaesis. In the years when the east was an imperial protectorate, boats laden with hides, wool and salt shuttled across the lake's placid waters, returning with imperial silks and silver. With the coming of the Khuzaits and the subsequent wars the water-trade stopped, but Chaikand remains a major trade entrepot and military base, the fief of the ruling Urkhunait clan. From the pavilions of his palace, the khan can look out across the lake and see the hazy outline of hills that he may one day graze his horses upon.
中文译文: 柴坎德坐落在塔纳埃西斯湖边的芦苇沼泽旁。在东方曾是帝国保护国的年代里，满载皮革、羊毛和盐的船只穿梭于平静的湖面，载回帝国的丝绸与白银。随着库赛特人的到来及随后的战争，水上贸易停止了，但柴坎德仍是主要贸易枢纽和军事基地，是统治家族乌尔库奈特的封地。从宫殿的凉亭中，可汗可以眺望湖面，看到朦胧的山丘轮廓——或许有朝一日，他会在那里放牧马群。

英文原文: Kamshar sits beneath a low range of hills separating Lake Tanaesis from the western tributaries of the Tayegh River. by Villagers collect clay from the riverbed for sale to the potters of Chaikand and other towns.
中文译文: 卡姆沙尔位于分隔塔纳埃西斯湖与塔耶赫河西部支流的低矮山脉之下。村民们从河床采集黏土，卖给柴坎德及其他城镇的陶工。

英文原文: Okhutan is a village at the center of a wheat-growing district on a narrow stretch of plain between the Akkan Hills and Lake Tanaesis, which the Khuzaits call the Tanaz Sea.
中文译文: 奥胡坦是一座村庄，坐落于阿克坎丘陵与塔纳埃西斯湖（库赛特人称其为塔纳兹海）之间狭长平原上的小麦产区中心。

英文原文: Ispantar is a village on a rocky spur of the Akkan Hills overlooking Lake Tanaesis, which the Khuzaits call the Tanaz Sea. The villagers here make most of their income from the raising of sheep.
中文译文: 伊斯潘塔尔是阿坎丘陵一处岩石山脊上的村庄，俯瞰着塔纳埃西斯湖（库赛特人称之为塔纳兹海）。这里的村民主要靠牧羊为生。

英文原文: Pabastan sits in the narrow plain between the Akkan Hills and Lake Tanaesis, which the Khuzaits call the Tanaz Sea. This land is fine country for wheat.
中文译文: 帕巴斯坦位于阿坎丘陵与塔纳埃西斯湖（库赛特人称之为塔纳兹海）之间的狭长平原上。这片土地是种植小麦的良田。

英文原文: The town of Odokh sits at the foot of Kohi Rohini, the mountains of the dawn. Among the most remote of the towns of the Devseg, it is reputed to have been the abode of King Ahhak, a mythical tyrant from whose shoulders flowed serpents. Even today the Kohi Rohini has a reputation for black magic and mystery that helps keep outsiders at bay. The city fell during the Khuzait conquest to the Harfit clan, who have intermarried with the mountain peoples, and who honor their customs, participate in their rituals, and keep their secrets.
中文译文: 奥多克镇坐落在科希罗希尼山——黎明之山的脚下。作为德夫塞格最偏远的城镇之一，传说这里曾是暴君阿哈克王的居所，他的肩上流淌着毒蛇。即使在今天，科希罗希尼仍以黑魔法与神秘著称，令外人望而却步。该城在库赛特征服期间落入哈菲特家族之手，该家族与山地民族通婚，尊重他们的习俗，参与他们的仪式，并保守他们的秘密。

英文原文: Karahan lies in in the foothills of the Kohi Rohini, the mountains of the dawn. The villagers here buy horses from the wandering tribes, and raise some of their own, making this the source for many of the steeds ridden by the Khuzait armies.
中文译文: 卡拉汉位于科希罗希尼山——黎明之山的山麓地带。这里的村民从游牧部落购买马匹，并自行饲养一些，因此成为库赛特军队所骑乘战马的来源地之一。

英文原文: Nutyuk sits in the plains of the upper Tiagys River, known by the Khuzaits as the Tayegh. The villagers here, mostly recently settled nomads, raise sheep like their ancestors.
中文译文: 努图克坐落在蒂亚吉斯河上游的平原上，库赛特人称其为塔耶赫河。这里的村民大多是最近定居的游牧民，像他们的祖先一样牧羊。

英文原文: Danara sits near the source of the headwaters of the Tiagys River in the foothills of the Kohi Rohini, the mountains of the dawn. Salt and sulfur springs flow out of fissures in the rock here, giving the waters of the river an acrid taste until, further down, they are diluted by other creeks and streams.
中文译文: 达纳拉位于蒂亚吉斯河源头附近，在科希罗希尼山——黎明之山的山麓地带。盐泉和硫磺泉从岩石裂缝中涌出，使河水带有刺鼻的味道，直到下游被其他溪流稀释。

英文原文: Tismil sits on the Ozu River, which drains the southern end of the Devseg plateau. The region is a center of horse-raising, as noyans seek to breed new larger warhorses that still retain the hardiness and adaptability of their ancestors' steppe ponies.
中文译文: 蒂斯米尔坐落在奥祖河畔，该河排干德夫塞格高原的南端。该地区是养马中心，诺颜们试图培育出新的、更大的战马，同时保留其祖先草原矮马的耐力和适应性。

英文原文: This is the retirement retreat location.
You lied. The bargain is void. Gunnar, do what you will with him.
中文译文: 你撒谎了。交易作废。贡纳尔，随你处置他。

英文原文: Are you threatening me? You won't get a single coin from my uncles if you harm me.
中文译文: 你在威胁我吗？你若伤我，从我叔父那里你一个子儿也拿不到。

英文原文: Now Gunnar says they are even worse than the king and the jarls we fought, preying upon the farmers and fishermen of the coast. There's no honor in attacking the weak, he told me so many times. And he's right, of course - it's just that it's so much easier to take their wealth!
中文译文: 如今贡纳尔说，他们甚至比我们曾与之战斗的科农格和雅尔们还要恶劣，劫掠沿海的农夫和渔夫。攻击弱者毫无荣誉可言，他对我讲过许多次。当然，他是对的——只是夺取他们的财富要容易得多！

英文原文: Our captured ship, the Golden Wasp, is fast and maneuverable and has that ballista. If we make it as light as possible by removing all cargo and move in our strongest rowers to man the oars, we can dart within range while avoiding that flaming pitch. Then we can use the ballista to take out the mangonels one by one, and when they’re all down, the rest of us will storm in and clear their decks.
中文译文: 我们俘获的船——戈尔登瓦斯普号——速度快、机动性好，还配有那架巴利斯塔。如果我们卸下所有货物，尽可能减轻重量，并调来最强壮的桨手划桨，就能在避开燃烧沥青的同时进入射程。然后我们可以用巴利斯塔逐一摧毁投石机，等它们全部被毁，其余人便冲上去清理甲板。

英文原文: If you're indeed of a mind to go with us, I'm happy to take you. But I've got room for only you. So if you've got any traveling companions, you'll need to leave them in this port. I'm sure you'll be back soon to rejoin them, safe and sound.
中文译文: 如果你确实打算跟我们走，我很乐意带你。但我只能容纳你一个人。所以如果你有旅伴，就得把他们留在这个左舷。我相信你很快就会平安归来，与他们重聚。

英文原文: We shall need to think on this, but it might even be good to keep Crusas with us, to converse with Purig or his crew.
中文译文: 我们需要考虑一下，但或许把克鲁萨斯留在身边也不错，可以让他与普里格或他的船员交谈。

英文原文: You're safe now. Rest. We can speak later.
中文译文: 你现在安全了。休息吧。我们稍后再谈。

英文原文: Now then… I wish to present you with my old acquaintance, Salautas Crusas, who gave himself up when the last of his men fell to our swords. He seems very sure of himself for a man in his circumstances, and will no doubt try to bluster his way out of trouble.
中文译文: 那么……我想向你介绍我的老相识，萨劳塔斯·克鲁萨斯，他在最后一名部下倒在我剑下时投降了。以他的处境而言，他似乎非常自信，无疑会试图虚张声势以摆脱困境。

英文原文: {PLAYER.NAME}... So… I have been making inquiries into what Fahda told us, about these Vlandian pirates in Purig's employ and their plan to steal the Sturgian silver. Several large warships have been sighted patrolling near {SETTLEMENT_LINK}. I suspect that these are the Vlandians.
中文译文: {PLAYER.NAME}……所以……我一直在调查法赫达告诉我们的事，关于那些受雇于普里格的弗兰迪安海盗团以及他们偷窃斯特吉亚白银的计划。几艘大型舰船被发现在{SETTLEMENT_LINK}附近巡逻。我怀疑这些就是弗兰迪安海盗团。

英文原文: Are you ready to sail to the Angranfjord to carry out our plan? Purig may not be waiting there for much longer.
中文译文: 你准备好塞尔到安格兰菲尤尔德执行我们的计划了吗？普里格可能不会在那里等太久。

英文原文: Keep an eye on the horizon, and look for sails.

中文译文: 丢弃的舰船提供影响力。

英文原文: Take out the guards as stealthily as possible.
中文译文: 解决守卫尽可能 stealthily 地。
萨克塞斯号！你击败了法赫达的舰队。

英文原文: I'm not ready to sail just yet.
Well done! Give her another one, for luck.
中文译文: 干得好！再给吉夫号来一发，讨个拉克号。

英文原文: {VALUE}% to wages for cavalry troops while at sea.
中文译文: {VALUE}% 骑兵部队在海上的工资

英文原文: I am Salautas Crusas. I sail under the protection of the Sea Hounds. If you kill me, it will not go well for you.
中文译文: 我是萨劳塔斯·克鲁萨斯。我在西霍恩德团的庇护下塞尔。如果你杀了我，你不会有好下场。

英文原文: A true warrior, to my mind, knows his own mettle. He does not need others to remind of his honor. He knows that sometimes in war you suffer bad luck - your ship arrived late, you were carried away in the rush of a rout, you were defeated by a king with forces far greater than your own.
中文译文: 在我看来，真正的勇士了解自己的本事。他不需要别人提醒他的荣誉。他知道战争中有时会遭遇拉克号——你的舰船来迟了，你在溃败的洪流中被冲走，你被兵力远胜于你的国王击败。

英文原文: We're here making war upon the Sea Hounds, a pirate confederation.
中文译文: 我们在这里与海盗联盟西霍恩德团作战。

英文原文: Flagship figurehead provides bonus to all allied ships.
中文译文: 旗舰船首像为所有友军舰船提供增益。

英文原文: I suspect Purig will try to travel as far from these parts as possible. Perhaps deep into the south, or to the east... Perhaps I will take years to find him, or perhaps my old age will finally catch up to me on the road or on the seas. I do not know if we will meet again.
中文译文: 我怀疑普里格会尽量远离这些地方。也许深入南方，或者东方……我可能要花数年才能找到他，或者我的暮年最终在路上或海上追上我。我不知道我们是否还会再见。

英文原文: Farewell to you too, and good luck.
Those timbers on your cell look thick. I don't have time now to chop through them.
中文译文: 你牢房上的那些木头看起来很厚。我现在没时间砍断它们。

英文原文: Very well. I hope you find your kin some day. Listen, whatever I manage to do near Hvalvik, I will return here and try to find other warriors to help me. If you ever reconsider, look for me here in Ostican.
中文译文: 很好。希望你有一天能找到你的亲人。听着，无论我在瓦尔维克附近做成什么，我都会回到这里，寻找其他战士来帮我。如果你改变主意，就来奥斯蒂坎找我。

英文原文: So that information is worth something to you, is it not? If we add in that ransom I mentioned, is it enough to buy my life and my freedom?
中文译文: 所以那条信息对你来说有价值，不是吗？如果加上我提到的赎金，够买我的命和自由吗？

英文原文: Cut the prisoner ship loose, so you can sail it to safety.
中文译文: 割断囚船的缆绳，这样你就可以把它驶到安全的地方。
卡普彻·默钱特·克鲁萨斯

英文原文: Purchase price and upgrade costs of the ruling clan's ships is decreased by 10%{newline}Wood and smithy workshop output is decreased by 5% kingdom-wide.
中文译文: 统治家族舰船的购买价格和升级成本降低 10%{newline}木材和铁匠铺产量在全王国范围内降低 5%。
那是他们最后一个人了！

英文原文: Well, some of the brothers listened to him, men who had fought against Volbjorn to whom a fine meal of wealth seasoned with revenge sounded rather tasty. But the rest of us… We'd heard such promises before, and we had no wish to serve any king. Better to fight for gold… and if you want the gold to flow, you honor your contracts, even if some fancy Calradian merchant comes along offering you the riches of the seven seas.
中文译文: 嗯，有些兄弟听信了他，那些曾与沃尔比约恩作战的人，觉得一顿丰盛的财富大餐配上复仇的佐料相当美味。但我们其余的人……我们以前听过这样的承诺，我们不想为任何国王效力。最好为黄金而战……如果你想让黄金源源不断，你就得遵守契约，即使某个花哨的卡拉迪亚商人跑来用七大洋的财富诱惑你。

英文原文: Along the winding veins of a major river that cuts through the steppe, your family carved a life from the water's edge. Using small, makeshift rafts and boats, they developed a keen eye for the river's bounty, gathering specific plants from its banks and fishing in its shallows. From your humble parents, you inherited a deep well of knowledge.
中文译文: 沿着一条贯穿草原的大河蜿蜒的支流，你的家族在水边谋生。他们使用简陋的木筏和小船，对河流的馈赠有着敏锐的眼光，从岸边采集特定的植物，在浅滩捕鱼。从你 humble 的父母那里，你继承了一笔深厚的知识财富。

英文原文: Pirates are scum. Let's just sail out and crush them.
中文译文: 海盗都是渣滓。我们直接出海碾碎他们。

英文原文: With so much wealth at stake, the Sturgians are right to be cautious.
中文译文: 面对如此巨大的财富，斯特吉亚人谨慎行事是对的。

英文原文: encouraging lords to pillage enemy territory.
中文译文: 鼓励领主劫掠敌方领土。

英文原文: You spent your adolescence helping your uncle with his fishing business, learning the ropes (literally!) of seamanship, from mending nets to hauling in the catch.
中文译文: 你的青少年时期是在帮你叔父打理渔业生意中度过的，从修补渔网到拉网捕鱼，你学会了航海的门道（字面意义上的！）。

英文原文: Fahda's flagship is going down. Defeat the rest of her fleet.
中文译文: 法赫达的旗舰正在沉没。击败她舰队的其余舰船。

英文原文: You declined to join {GANGRADIR.LINK} on his voyage, but may be able to find him later at {SETTLEMENT}.
中文译文: 你拒绝了与{GANGRADIR.LINK}同航，但日后或许能在{SETTLEMENT}找到他。

英文原文: Here's the detail that would interest you…. In addition to all the other delights that Crusas dangled before us, he also offered to build us ships. Purig was going to construct them in some northern anchorage called Angranfjord, where he had brought a large number of captives to work in a shipyard.
中文译文: 有个细节你定会感兴趣……除了克鲁萨斯抛出的种种诱惑，他还许诺为我们造船。普里格打算在北方一个叫安格兰菲尤尔德的锚地建造，那里他押了大批俘虏在船坞劳作。

英文原文: Unchain yourself from the oar bench.
You make quick work of the alley thugs, and help their victim to his feet. He seems dazed, but grateful.
中文译文: 你利落地收拾了巷中暴徒，扶起受害者。他神情恍惚，但满怀感激。

英文原文: Row! Let’s not be sitting ducks here.
中文译文: 划桨！别在这儿当活靶子。

英文原文: Bjolgur of Gauksdal! Well met! Are the Skolderbroda working for the merchants of {SETTLEMENT_LINK} now?
中文译文: 高克斯达尔的比奥尔古尔！幸会！斯科尔德布罗达如今在为{SETTLEMENT_LINK}的商人卖命了吗？

英文原文: A fight, you say… I take it that Gunnar and you won?
中文译文: 你说打了一架……看来贡纳尔和你赢了？

英文原文: Listen, you lot, I'm in a bit of a hurry. If I give you a penny each will you stop pestering me?
中文译文: 听着，诸位，我赶时间。每人给一枚铜板，能别烦我了吗？

英文原文: Hey! Over here! Let's not get separated.

You have arrived in {SETTLEMENT_LINK}. As you sail up the estuary into the harbor, you spot several large ships at anchor in a cove. They look like Vlandian craft, probably the pirates that Fahda told you about. They do not try to give chase, however, possibly because they saw you too late to raise sail, or perhaps because they are lying in wait for more lucrative prey.
中文译文: 你抵达了{SETTLEMENT_LINK}。驶入河口港湾时，你发现几艘大船锚泊在海湾中。它们像是瓦兰迪亚人的船只，恐怕就是法赫达所说的海盗。不过它们并未追击，或许是发现你时已来不及升帆，又或许是在等待更肥的猎物。

英文原文: We’re right behind you! Row, lads, row!
中文译文: 我们紧跟在你身后！划啊，弟兄们，划啊！

英文原文: Well, {PLAYER.NAME}... Your sister is free, thank the gods. Purig may have gotten away, but I doubt the Sea Hounds will be troubling us much more.
中文译文: 好了，{PLAYER.NAME}……你姐妹自由了，谢天谢地。普里格或许逃了，但西霍恩德团怕是再难兴风作浪。

英文原文: allowing the ruler to collect a share of the revenue from the sales of ships.
中文译文: 允许统治者从船只销售中抽取一份收入。

英文原文: You forced {HERO.NAME} to help you capture Purig's prisoner ship, promising him nothing. (+{CALCULATING_BONUS_AMOUNT} calculating bonus)
中文译文: 你迫使{HERO.NAME}帮你夺取普里格的囚船，未作任何承诺。（+{CALCULATING_BONUS_AMOUNT}算计加成）

英文原文: {VALUE} extra ammunition per stack for thrown weapons of the crew.
中文译文: 船员投掷武器每叠额外{VALUE}弹药。

英文原文: Reach the open seas by avoiding enemy ships.
Several score, all in good health. We've been feeding them well, sparing no expense. We take pride in our work.
中文译文: 几十人，都健健康康的。我们好吃好喝养着，不惜成本。我们以工作为荣。

英文原文: Set all prisoners on the ship free.
{VALUE} loyalty for each fishing boat returning to port.
中文译文: 每艘渔船归港时{VALUE}忠诚度。

英文原文: {VALUE} building material in settlement for each merchant convoy visiting port
中文译文: 每支商队到港时定居点获得{VALUE}建筑材料

英文原文: Just before I set sail for {SETTLEMENT_LINK}, my brothers and I had a visitor, a merchant named Salautas Crusas who said he was acting as an “ambassador” for Purig. He wanted us to break our contract with Balgard and ally with the Sea Hounds instead. He offered a great deal of money, too, and more - we could share in Purig's grand plan of conquest.
中文译文: 就在我启航前往{SETTLEMENT_LINK}之前，我和兄弟们迎来了一位访客，一个名叫萨劳塔斯·克鲁萨斯的商人，他说自己是普里格的“大使”。他要我们撕毁与巴尔加德的合约，转而与西霍恩德团结盟。他开出了大笔金钱，甚至更多——我们可以分享普里格的征服大计。

英文原文: Our fortunes have changed. This morning you were a captive, but now you are a lady of rank.
中文译文: 我们的命运已然改变。今晨你还是阶下之囚，如今却已是位高权重的莱迪。

英文原文: Successfully raiding a village grants the raiding clan +5 influence.{newline}For each lord party currently staying in a town owned by the kingdom, town security is reduced by 1 daily
中文译文: 成功劫掠村庄使劫掠家族获得+5影响力。{newline}每有一位雅尔队伍停留在王国所属城镇，城镇治安每日-1。

英文原文: Come down to the ship with me, then! Wind and tide are with us, and I won't tarry long.
中文译文: 那就随我下舰船吧！风与潮汐皆顺，我不会久留。

英文原文: The alley thugs are too many for you, and knock you to the ground. Before they can finish you off, however, you hear a rush of feet and cries of alarm. The town watch must have heard the commotion, and your assailants make a quick retreat. The watch helps you to your feet and tells you to be more careful. The thugs' victim, dazed but apparently unhurt, introduces himself.
中文译文: 巷中暴徒人多势众，将你击倒在地。但就在他们欲下杀手之际，你听到一阵急促的脚步声和惊呼声。城镇卫兵定是听到了骚动，袭击者迅速撤退。卫兵扶你起身，叮嘱你多加小心。暴徒的受害者虽仍恍惚，却显然未受重伤，他自我介绍道。

英文原文: Acting on what you learned from Fahda, you and Gunnar sailed to the Sturgian port of Omor. There, you met another of Gunnar's old comrades, Bjolgur, a member of the Skolderbroda mercenary brotherhood. Bjolgur hoped to run the silver-ship past the Sea Hounds and enlisted you in his dangerous but effective plan to crash a fireship into their blockading fleet. In exchange, Bjolgur gave you information about a key Sea Hound ally, the imperial merchant Crusas, who he suspected would know more about your sister.
中文译文: 根据从法赫达处获得的情报，你与贡纳尔扬帆驶向斯特吉亚港口奥莫尔。在那里，你遇到了贡纳尔的另一位老战友——比奥尔古尔，他是斯科尔德布罗达佣兵兄弟会的成员。比奥尔古尔希望将银船偷运过西霍恩德团的封锁，并招募你参与他危险而有效的计划：用一艘火船撞击他们的封锁舰队。作为交换，比奥尔古尔提供了关于西霍恩德团关键盟友——帝国商人克鲁萨斯的情报，他怀疑此人知晓更多关于你姐妹的消息。

英文原文: The ruler is given a share of the revenue whenever one of the great houses of the realm sells a ship.
中文译文: 每当王国大贵族出售一艘舰船，统治者便从中分得一份收益。

英文原文: You no longer have a seaworthy ship. Your party will land on the nearest shore.
中文译文: 你已无适航之舰船。你的队伍将在最近的海岸登陆。

英文原文: Sail to the Skatria Islands off {SETTLEMENT_NAME}
中文译文: 扬帆驶向{SETTLEMENT_NAME}外的斯卡特里亚群岛

英文原文: I am Crusas Salautas. I seek Purig of Agilting.
中文译文: 我是克鲁萨斯·萨劳塔斯。我找阿吉尔廷的普里格。

英文原文: Heaven bless you, {?PLAYER.GENDER}Sister{?}Brother{\?}! I am ready to do my part, for our family and our future! But I can see your men calling you. Get us to safety, and we will speak again.
中文译文: 上天保佑你，{?PLAYER.GENDER}姐妹{?}兄弟{\?}！我已准备好尽我之责，为了我们的家族与未来！但我看到你的部下在召唤你。带我们到安全之处，我们日后再谈。

英文原文: Kingdom-wide militia generation boost: +25%{newline}Kingdom-wide village production penalty: -5%
中文译文: 王国全境民兵产出提升：+25%{newline}王国全境村庄产出惩罚：-5%

英文原文: The way is now clear to attack {HERO.NAME}'s fleet. Destroy it!
中文译文: 进攻{HERO.NAME}舰队的道路现已畅通。摧毁它！

英文原文: Ahoy! It's good to have you with us. We've seen sails, and I reckon that there are still pirates about.
中文译文: 嘿！有你们在真好。我们看到了塞尔，我估摸着附近还有海盗。

英文原文: Your men make quick work of the pirates. As the fighting dies down, you find that the Sea Hounds were carrying captives, bound and stashed beneath the rowing benches. You cut their bonds and help them to their feet as your lookouts scan the waters for any sign of the second ship.
中文译文: 你的部下迅速解决了海盗。战斗平息后，你发现西霍恩德团船上载有俘虏，被捆绑着塞在划桨座下。你割断绳索，扶他们起身，同时瞭望手扫视海面，寻找第二艘舰船的踪迹。

英文原文: Growing up on the harsh Nordic coast, you were trained from a young age to spot enemy sails and signal incoming raids. Agile and quick-witted, you honed your skills with a throwing axe and learned to fight in skirmishes. You dream of joining a raiding party and tasting the glory of conquest.
中文译文: 在严酷的诺德海岸长大，你自幼便受训识别敌塞尔、预警来袭。你身手敏捷、反应迅速，磨练了投掷斧的技巧，并学会了在散兵冲突中作战。你梦想加入劫掠队伍，品尝征服的荣耀。

英文原文: {VALUE}% fire damage dealt by your ship and crew to enemy sails.
中文译文: 你的舰船与船员对敌塞尔造成{VALUE}%火焰伤害。

英文原文: Hey you! Stranger! Would you like to help an old man drive off a few stray dogs here?
中文译文: 嘿，你！陌生人！愿意帮老汉赶走几条野狗吗？

英文原文: Once we get within range, their ballista will pelt us with fiery missiles. Avoid them – even if they just hit the water, the flames will keep burning and can spread to our hull.
中文译文: 一旦进入射程，他们的巴利斯塔就会向我们发射燃烧弹。避开它们——即使只击中水面，火焰也会继续燃烧，并可能蔓延到我们的哈尔。

英文原文: You silenced those mangonels! Now let’s all move in and board them!
中文译文: 你干掉了那些投石机！现在我们一起冲上去登船！

英文原文: Success! You have run the Sea Hound blockade and reached the sea.
中文译文: 成功！你突破了西霍恩德团的封锁，抵达大海。

英文原文: You are in the Skatrias. The jagged silhouettes of small rocky islands, streaked with gull dung, stretch southwest to the horizon.{NEW_LINE}{NEW_LINE}Through the hazy air you make out the outline of a sail. It’s still quite distant, but closing fast. They are clearly Sea Hounds, ready to pounce on anyone who ventures into their hunting grounds in the Skatrias.
中文译文: 你身处斯卡特里亚群岛。嶙峋的小岩石岛轮廓参差，布满海鸥粪便，向西南延伸至天际。{NEW_LINE}{NEW_LINE}透过朦胧的空气，你辨认出一面塞尔的轮廓。距离尚远，但正在迅速逼近。他们显然是西霍恩德团，随时准备扑向任何胆敢闯入斯卡特里亚猎场的人。

英文原文: You back out of the alley. You could easily escape, but you sense that the thugs will kill the old man.
中文译文: 你退出小巷。本可轻易脱身，但你预感暴徒会杀死老人。

英文原文: I accept your decision. Very well then…
中文译文: 我接受你的决定。那好吧……

英文原文: You have arrived at Angranfjord, Purig's lair.
中文译文: 你已抵达安格兰菲尤尔德，普里格的巢穴。

英文原文: You met a Nord warrior named Gunnar, helping him defeat an ambush in a back alley of Ostican. You decided to join forces with him to battle the Sea Hounds, a pirate confederacy, and hunt for your sister. But no sooner did you set out with him then the two of you were betrayed by his old comrade Purig, who had joined the Sea Hounds. His men were lax, however, and you were able to break out of captivity and make off with one of his ships.
中文译文: 你在奥斯蒂坎的后巷遇到一名叫贡纳尔的诺德战士，助他击退了一场伏击。你决定与他联手对抗海盗联盟“西霍恩德团”，并寻找你的姐妹。但刚与他出发，你们就被他昔日战友普里格出卖——此人已加入西霍恩德团。然而他的手下松懈，你们得以挣脱囚禁，夺走他的一艘舰船。

英文原文: Find {HERO.NAME} in her hunting grounds in the Gulf of Charas
中文译文: 在查拉斯湾的猎场找到{HERO.NAME}。

英文原文: Are you ready to deal with those two Sea Hound vessels?
中文译文: 你准备好对付那两艘西霍恩德团的船了吗？

英文原文: I don't care about your old wars. You put my sister in a cage.
中文译文: 我不在乎你过去的战争。你把我姐妹关进了笼子。

英文原文: But that is all for nothing. Instead, the kings of Nordvyg, the men that {QUEST_5_COMPANION.NAME} and I fought, will have the last laugh. So, do you like what you've wrought?
中文译文: 但这一切都白费了。相反，诺德维格的科农格们——我和{QUEST_5_COMPANION.NAME}曾与之战斗的人——将笑到最后。那么，你喜欢自己造成的后果吗？

英文原文: {PLAYER.NAME}, welcome! I've been entertaining the village with tales of our adventurers. If you're looking for recruits, then I doubt you'll find a more promising batch than the lads of Lagsholfn. You always have a place by my hearth, old friend.
中文译文: {PLAYER.NAME}，欢迎！我正用我们的冒险故事给村子助兴。若你招募新兵，我敢说拉格斯霍尔芬的小伙子们是最有前途的一批。我的炉火旁永远有你一席之地，老友。

英文原文: You return to Ostican harbor, and tie your ship up at the pier. Besides the Vlandian traders and fishing vessels lies a small Nordic longship. Gunnar tells you that some of his comrades have responded to his call to hunt the Sea Hounds. He tells you he needs to dictate a letter to some others, and asks you to meet him later in the port.
中文译文: 你返回奥斯蒂坎港，将船系在码头。在瓦兰迪亚商船和渔船旁，停着一艘诺德长船。贡纳尔告诉你，他的一些战友响应了他的号召，前来猎杀西霍恩德团。他说他需要给其他人写封信，让你稍后在港口会合。

英文原文: Come now, I couldn't have you dash off to hunt Crusas before the silver got past the Sea Hounds. My brothers named me their emissary, you see, and we diplomats need to be crafty.
中文译文: 得了吧，我怎能让你在银子运过西霍恩德团的地盘之前就冲去找克鲁萨斯？我的兄弟们任命我为使者，你瞧，我们外交官得耍点手段。

英文原文: Naval Auto Battle Combat Penalty Negation Effect
中文译文: 海战自动战斗惩罚抵消效果

英文原文: You have successfully escorted the Vlandian merchants to {SETTLEMENT_LINK}.
中文译文: 你已成功护送瓦兰迪亚商人至{SETTLEMENT_LINK}。

英文原文: Listen, though… We need someone to steer the fireship. I'd do it myself, but my order wants me to stay close to the silver. I'd found a few volunteers who've offered to do it, but they keep sobering up.
中文译文: 听着，不过……我们需要有人掌舵火船。我本想亲自上阵，但我的教团要我守在银子附近。我找到几个自愿者，但他们一清醒就反悔了。

英文原文: You arrived at Angranfjord and put your plan into action. While Crusas bantered with Purig's men, you and Gunnar swum to his prisoner ship and overcame the guards, sailing your sister to safety. Together with Lahar and Bjolgur you then engaged the Sea Hound fleet in a battle in the fjord. In the end, you fought Purig himself on his flagship and defeated him in a duel. You ended the Sea Hounds' reign of terror, and set your sister free. Gunnar awaits you in Ostican to say his farewells.
中文译文: 你抵达安格兰峡湾并按计划行动。克鲁萨斯与普里格的手下周旋时，你和贡纳尔游到囚船，制服守卫，将你的姐妹安全驶离。随后你与拉哈尔和比奥尔古尔一同在峡湾与西霍恩德团舰队交战。最终，你在旗舰上与普里格本人决斗并击败了他。你终结了西霍恩德团的恐怖统治，解放了你的姐妹。贡纳尔在奥斯蒂坎等你道别。

英文原文: joined the raiders as a lookout.
中文译文: 加入掠夺者担任瞭望手。

英文原文: went serving on a raider ship.
{VALUE}% damage dealt by crew to enemy sails.
中文译文: {VALUE}% 船员对敌帆造成的伤害。

英文原文: I've come to this port seeking warriors and a ship. These men we fought were allies of a pirate gang who call themselves the Sea Hounds. They have been raiding and slaving along the Nordvyg’s shores, and I intend to go to war with them.
中文译文: 我来此港寻找勇士和船只。我们刚才战斗的人是一伙自称“西霍恩德团”的海盗的盟友。他们一直在诺德维格沿岸劫掠和贩奴，我打算与他们开战。

英文原文: I still have things to do on shore.

So! {PLAYER.NAME}... You did well with that fireship! The silver is on its way to my order, and that bastard Purig will no doubt be much discomfitted. You helped me out there, so let me see if I can now help you.
中文译文: 好！{PLAYER.NAME}……那艘火船干得漂亮！银子已送往我的订单，那个混蛋普里格无疑会大失所望。你帮了我，现在让我看看能否帮你。

英文原文: Good, very good. With luck, the current shall carry it right into them, and they shall all merrily blaze up like a bonfire at a midwinter feast. The silver ship will make for the open sea, while the rest of us can have it out with any surviving Sea Hounds.
中文译文: 好，非常好。运气好的话，水流会把它直接送进他们中间，他们全会像仲冬盛宴的篝火一样欢快地燃烧起来。银船将驶向公海，而我们其余人可以与任何幸存的西霍恩德团一决高下。

英文原文: {VALUE}% melee damage dealt by crew when fighting on own ship.
中文译文: 船员在自己船上战斗时造成{VALUE}%近战伤害。

英文原文: {VALUE} morale for mariner troops at start of battle.
中文译文: 战斗开始时，水手部队获得{VALUE}士气。

英文原文: Can I tell Lahar that we are ready to sail? The tide and winds are with us, and it would be a pity if someone else were to hunt down Fahda and claim the bounty.
中文译文: 我能告诉拉哈尔我们准备启航了吗？潮汐和风向都对我们有利，要是别人抢先猎杀法赫达并领赏，那就可惜了。
狠狠打，兄弟们！干掉他们！

英文原文: You'll get your share of Crusas' ill-gained wealth, never fear.
中文译文: 你会分到克鲁萨斯的不义之财，别担心。

英文原文: I will join you, and we can hunt together.
中文译文: 我会加入你，我们可以一起狩猎。

英文原文: {VALUE}% to weight of mounts when in ship's cargo.
中文译文: {VALUE}% to weight of mounts when in ship's cargo.

英文原文: Your allies were defeated. You will have to try again.
中文译文: 你的盟友已被击败。你得再试一次。

英文原文: You'll just have to try and see.
Speak to Gunnar and Your Sister
Your family builded longships for the Sturgian river lords. You grew up amidst the sounds of hammering and the smell of tar, learning the craft of shipbuilding from your father and uncles.
中文译文: 你的家族为斯特吉亚河领主建造长船。你在锤声与焦油味中长大，从父亲和叔父那里学习造船技艺。

英文原文: Ach. We couldn't catch Fahda in time.
中文译文: 唉。我们没能及时抓住法赫达。

英文原文: I need a bit more time.
Did you see that big fiery ball? Not very accurate, I’ll warrant, but if one of our ships gets hit by one of those… Those who don’t jump into the sea in time will die a nasty death.
中文译文: 你看到那个大火球了吗？我敢说准头不怎么样，但如果我们的船被其中一颗击中……那些没及时跳海的人会死得很惨。

英文原文: Ahoy to you, Gunnar! An exemplary escape! Is the captive safe?
中文译文: 向你致敬，贡纳尔！一次典范的逃脱！俘虏安全吗？

英文原文: All clans within the kingdom benefit from a -15% reduction in ship purchase costs on own kingdom's ports.{newline}-10% tariff income
中文译文: 王国内所有家族在本国港口购买船只费用降低15%。{newline}关税收入减少10%。

英文原文: The clang of hammer on hot iron was the defining sound of your upbringing. Your family were more than mere smiths; they were artisans who coaxed wonders from limited resources, shaping valuable iron into formidable weapons and treasured tools. From the forge, you learned to work with what little you had, understanding the unique properties of each piece and the almost magical skill required to transform it.
中文译文: 锤击热铁的声音是你成长的标志。你的家族不仅是铁匠，更是工匠，用有限的资源创造奇迹，将宝贵的铁打造成 formidable 的武器和珍贵的工具。在锻造中，你学会了用微薄之物工作，了解每块材料的独特属性，以及将其转化所需的近乎神奇的技艺。

英文原文: Cannot leave story mode due to war.
中文译文: 因战争无法离开故事模式。

英文原文: Cannot leave story mode due to ongoing siege.
中文译文: 因正在围城，无法离开故事模式。

英文原文: Thank the Heavens. And thank you. Those Sea Hound vessels would have torn us to pieces. You came just in time.
中文译文: 感谢苍穹，也感谢你。那些豪恩德号的船本会将我们撕成碎片。你来得正是时候。

英文原文: Go for her flagship! We don’t want it to get away! We’ll deal with the lesser vessels later.
中文译文: 冲向她的旗舰！不能让它逃了！那些小船稍后再收拾。

英文原文: So… You are the captain who thrashed those so-called Sea Hounds up north. I have a proposal that I hope would be of interest to a man such as you.
中文译文: 那么……你就是那位在北方痛击所谓西霍恩德团的队长。我有一个提议，希望像你这样的人会感兴趣。

英文原文: Defeat Crusas’ men in the battle aboard the floating fortress
中文译文: 在浮空堡垒上的战斗中击败克鲁萨斯的手下

英文原文: The Sea Hounds, I hear, they've mostly scattered. It's time for me to return to my home in Beinland. I've settled what I wish to settle, and all this rowing and ramming and climbing and jostling and fighting is hard on my old bones.
中文译文: 我听说西霍恩德团大多已四散。是时候返回我在贝因兰的家了。我想解决的事都已解决，而这划桨、撞角、攀爬、推挤、战斗，对我这把老骨头来说太辛苦了。

英文原文: granting the ruler a share of all ransoms.
中文译文: 给予统治者所有赎金的一部分。

英文原文: If you think they're sick you're welcome not to buy any.
中文译文: 如果你觉得它们有病，大可不买。

英文原文: Enter the hold of the ship.
I'm going to free you, and kill every last one of those slavers!
中文译文: 我要解放你，杀光那些奴隶贩子！

英文原文: {VALUE}% to hearth growth rate in coastal villages
Well, {PLAYER.NAME}... Your sister is free, thank the gods. You gave Purig a far more honorable death than he deserved. Men will speak well of you.
中文译文: 嗯，{PLAYER.NAME}……你的姐妹自由了，感谢诸神。你给了普里格一个远比他应得的更荣誉的死法。人们会称赞你的。

英文原文: Each day, a pirate party operating within the kingdom's coastline has a 5% chance to surrender to the nearest coastal town. Upon surrendering, its ships are donated to the town's shipyard, and its members join the town's garrison.{newline}For each surrendered pirate party that settlement's security is immediately decreased by 5.
中文译文: 每天，在王国内海岸线活动的海盗队伍有5%的几率向最近的沿海城镇投降。投降后，其船只捐给城镇的船坞，成员加入城镇的驻军。{newline}每支投降的海盗队伍会使该定居点的治安立即降低5。

英文原文: Armies that are commanded by a Nord commander lose 30% more cohesion on land.
中文译文: 由诺德指挥官指挥的军团在陆地上凝聚力额外损失30%。

英文原文: I am as ready as I will ever be, I suppose.
中文译文: 我想我已经准备好了，大概吧。

英文原文: Easy there, grandpa. Hand off your sword hilt.
中文译文: 悠着点，老家伙。把剑柄交出来。

英文原文: Your fleet will be here in {HOURS} {?(HOURS > 1)}hours{?}hour{\?}!
中文译文: 你的舰队将在{HOURS} {?(HOURS > 1)}小时{?}小时{\?}后抵达！

英文原文: Keep watch for approaching enemy ships.
{VALUE}% to production of fish at villages governed of the governed settlement.
中文译文: 被统治定居点管辖的村庄鱼类产量{VALUE}%。

英文原文: A coastal guard force stands ready to assist allies in battles within the town's territorial waters{newline}Coastal town garrisons wages are increased by 15%
中文译文: 一支海岸警卫队已准备就绪，可在城镇领海内的战斗中协助盟友。{newline}沿海城镇驻军工资增加15%。

英文原文: Do you see that big cluster of ships back there? That's got to be where they're holding the prisoners. That smaller vessel out front, though - that's got to be a picket, and it will stop us before we get too close. Let's approach it, pretending to be a buyer, while Bjolgur and Lahar stay out of sight. Crusas can banter with them a bit as a distraction. One of our men shall stand at his side with a dagger, lest he betray us.
中文译文: 你看到后面那大群舰船了吗？那肯定就是关押俘虏的地方。不过前面那艘小船——那肯定是哨船，会在我们靠近前拦住我们。我们假装成买家靠近它，而比奥尔古尔和拉哈尔则藏在暗处。克鲁萨斯可以跟他们闲聊几句作为掩护。我们派一个人手持匕首站在他身旁，以防他背叛。

英文原文: You're not the only buyer, my friend! Mines, buildings, repairs... Even on the mainland, mix a handful of our fellows in with some convicts or war captives, and who's to notice?
中文译文: 你不是唯一的买家，吾友！矿山、建筑、修理……就算在大陆上，把我们的人混进一些罪犯或战俘里，谁会注意到呢？

英文原文: You pass out from the pain of your wounds.
中文译文: 你因伤口疼痛而昏厥过去。
{VALUE}% 因舰船摇晃造成的精准度惩罚。

英文原文: You'll need to wait for our master to return before you start bargaining. Don't push your friendship with Purig too much, though - he's got expensive tastes. He likes to see the envy in other men's eyes when the sun sparkles off his fine golden helm.
中文译文: 你得等我们主人回来才能开始谈价。不过别跟普里格套近乎——他眼光可高。他喜欢看阳光照在他那顶精美金盔上时，别人眼中的嫉妒。

英文原文: When we get close, I will set fire to our ship and then we swim to shore.
中文译文: 等我们靠近了，我就点燃我们的舰船，然后游向岸边。

英文原文: Are you really a farmer, now? Callouses such as those on your hands are made by oars, not ploughs. And I see a scar on your sword-arm that doesn't look like it came from the kick of a mule. Indeed, I might even recall your name. Hralgar Eel-Nose, is it not?
中文译文: 你现在真当农夫了？你手上的老茧是桨磨出来的，不是犁。还有你剑臂上的伤疤，看着可不像骡子踢的。我甚至还记得你的名字。赫拉尔加·鳗鼻，对吧？

英文原文: Sounds like good fun. I’ll do it.
中文译文: 听起来挺有意思。我干了。

英文原文: {VALUE}% to campaign map speed of town's fishing boats.
中文译文: {VALUE}% 城镇渔船的大地图速度。

英文原文: All is good? Packed your bag, kissed your mother and your sweetheart good-bye? Of course my lads and I won't mind if you want to tarry here a little longer. Oh no. There's no hurry at all.
中文译文: 都准备好了？收拾好行囊，跟母亲和心上人吻别了？当然，我和我的兄弟们不介意你再多待一会儿。哦不，一点都不急。

英文原文: Naval combat morale of lord parties is increased by 20%{newline}Troop XP gain is reduced by 15%
中文译文: 领主部队的海战士气提升20%{newline}士兵经验获取减少15%

英文原文: Your family was a tight-knit crew on a sturdy fishing vessel. They weren't charting uncharted seas, but venturing just beyond the familiar fjords, bartering with coastal settlements for smoked fish and bragging rights about the biggest catch. Tales of faraway lands might have been spun under flickering lanterns, but the reality was weathered sails, calloused hands, and a knack for reading the temperamental sea.
中文译文: 你的家人是一艘坚固渔船上的亲密船员。他们并非探索未知海域，而是冒险驶出熟悉的峡湾，与沿海定居点交易熏鱼，吹嘘最大的渔获。在摇曳的灯火下或许会讲述远方的故事，但现实是风帆破旧、双手长茧，以及读懂喜怒无常的大海的本事。

英文原文: Both you and the town have no available ships
中文译文: 你和该城镇均无可用舰船。

英文原文: 20% ship movement speed in rivers and coastal seas.
中文译文: 河流与沿海海域舰船速度提升20%。

英文原文: You are no longer a prisoner. Since you don't have a seaworthy ship, your party will land on the nearest shore.
中文译文: 你不再是囚犯。由于没有适航舰船，你的队伍将在最近的海岸登陆。

英文原文: I’ll let you decide how to fight this one. Maneuver a bit, or just go straight at them?
中文译文: 你来决定怎么打这一仗。稍微机动一下，还是直接冲上去？

英文原文: Troops are required to spend part of their time training at sea, practicing shooting and fighting on an unstable deck.
中文译文: 士兵需花费部分时间在海上训练，在不稳定的德克上练习射击与格斗。

英文原文: Destroy the enemy ship by ramming it with your fireship.
中文译文: 用你的火船撞击摧毁敌舰船。

英文原文: Splendid. The tide and winds are with us. Let us go forth!
中文译文: 太好了。潮汐与温德号都对我们有利。出发吧！
霍尔德奥夫西豪恩兹号

英文原文: Overtake and defeat {HERO.NAME} and her fleet.
中文译文: 追上并击败 {HERO.NAME} 及其舰队。

英文原文: So.. I can tell you how to find Purig, which means you’ve found your sister as well. But if you harm me, it’s likely you’ll never have such a chance again. So I repeat - do we have a bargain?
中文译文: 那么……我可以告诉你如何找到普里格，这意味着你也找到了你的姐妹。但如果你伤害我，很可能你再也没有这样的机会了。所以我再问一次——我们成交吗？

英文原文: Had enough, have you? Well, are you going to honor your word and put us ashore?
中文译文: 受够了吧？那么，你打算信守诺言，送我们上岸吗？

英文原文: Your kin braved the lakes and rivers in hide-covered currachs, fishing icy waters and facing the dangers of strong currents and occasional banditry. You grew up learning to navigate the treacherous waters and to defend yourself from those who would prey on the river traffic.
中文译文: 你的族人乘着兽皮小舟，在湖泊与河流中搏击风浪，在冰寒水域中捕鱼，面对激流与偶尔的匪患。你从小学习在险恶水域中航行，并自卫抵御那些劫掠河运的歹徒。

英文原文: Jump off the ship, following Gunnar into the water.
中文译文: 跳下舰船，跟随贡纳尔入水。
从被击败的商船队中掠夺{VALUE}%的战利品。

英文原文: You can't start parley while embarking.
{VALUE} denars for each ship bought or sold in governed settlement.
中文译文: 在管辖定居点每买卖一艘舰船，获得{VALUE}第纳尔。

英文原文: One moment I am a slave and the next I seem to be some sort of noble lady... I need some time to rest. I will seek out our brother {BROTHER.NAME}.
中文译文: 前一秒我还是个奴隶，下一秒却成了某种贵族莱迪……我需要时间休息。我会去找我们的兄弟{BROTHER.NAME}。

英文原文: I need a little while here in port first.
中文译文: 我需要先在左舷待一会儿。

英文原文: Very well. Come back here when you're ready.

As for the Sea Hounds, I hear, they've mostly scattered. It's time for me to return to my home in Beinland. I've settled what I wish to settle, and all this rowing and ramming and climbing and jostling and fighting is hard on my old bones.
中文译文: 至于西霍恩德团，我听说他们大多已经散去了。是时候回到我在贝因兰的家了。我想解决的事情已经解决，所有这些划桨、冲撞、攀爬、推挤和战斗，对我这把老骨头来说太辛苦了。

英文原文: Well done! Now, help us get these chains off.
中文译文: 干得好！现在，帮我们把这些钦斯弄开。

英文原文: {VALUE}% to weight of trade goods in ship's cargo.
中文译文: {VALUE}% to weight of trade goods in ship's cargo.

英文原文: Purig and his men jump into the waters of the bay and wade to shore. They disappear into the forested cliffs by the fjord. Meanwhile, you return to the Sea Hounds' roundship, which your men have already begun to search for loot and captives to free. As hopeful cries well up from the hold, they pry open the hatches, and look below.
中文译文: 普里格和他的手下跳入海湾的水中，涉水上岸。他们消失在峡湾旁的森林峭壁中。与此同时，你回到西霍恩德团的圆船，你的手下已经开始搜查战利品并释放俘虏。随着霍尔德号中传来希望的呼喊，他们撬开舱门，向下望去。

英文原文: You were able to run the Sea Hound blockade.
中文译文: 你成功突破了豪恩德号的封锁。

英文原文: {VALUE} morale for regular troops at start of battle.
中文译文: 战斗开始时，常规部队士气+{VALUE}。

英文原文: He acts as though the Sea Hounds have already crowned him their king. He demanded that I hunt for captives here in the south and sell them to him, promising to pay me with a huge store of silver that some new partners of his, a vile-looking gang of Vlandian pirates, hoped to steal from the merchants of Omor.
中文译文: 他表现得好像西霍恩德团已经加冕他为国王。他命令我在南方追捕俘虏并卖给他，承诺用一大笔银子支付——那是他的一些新伙伴，一伙面目可憎的弗兰迪安海盗团，希望从奥莫尔商人那里偷来的。

英文原文: How much are my uncles paying you, anyway? I have a chest of silver set aside for occasions such as this, and I suspect I could pay you more than they will. They are stingy men.
中文译文: 我叔父们到底付了你多少钱？我为此类场合准备了一箱银子，我怀疑我能付得比他们多。他们是吝啬之人。

英文原文: Are we ready to set sail for the Skatrias? I imagine that Crusas will be docked there for some time, but we don’t want to miss this opportunity.
中文译文: 我们准备好启航前往斯卡特里亚斯了吗？我想克鲁萨斯会在那里停泊一段时间，但我们不想错过这个机会。

英文原文: Your fireship missed its target! The enemy flagship is unscathed.
中文译文: 你的火船未击中目标！敌方旗舰毫发无损。

英文原文: Your troops have returned from delivering {SHIP_NAME} to {PARTY_NAME}.
中文译文: 你的部队已将{SHIP_NAME}送达{PARTY_NAME}并返回。

英文原文: Things have indeed changed. Rest now, but remember that you are of the {CLAN_NAME}, and you must learn to command respect.
中文译文: 确实变了。现在休息吧，但记住你是{CLAN_NAME}的一员，必须学会赢得尊重。

英文原文: The wind is with us. Should we unfurl the sail?
{VALUE}% to catch brought in by fishing boats from settlements.
中文译文: {VALUE}% 来自定居点渔船捕获的渔获

英文原文: The merchant party is under attack.
Improves your navigational abilities, the effectiveness of naval siege engines under your command, and the speed and quality of ship repairs and upgrades.
中文译文: 提升你的航海能力、麾下海军攻城器械的效能，以及舰船修理与升级的速度与质量。

英文原文: Very good. I'll keep command of our old knarr. You captain this agile snekkja.
中文译文: 很好。我继续指挥我们的老克纳尔号。你来指挥这艘敏捷的斯内克贾号。

英文原文: We would still wish to show you our gratitude. I took a collection among the men whose lives you saved today. We wish to offer you a barrel of oil and a bundle of ivory. These are the rewards of our labor over the past months, but they would mean nothing to us if our ship were seized by pirates.
中文译文: 我们仍想向你表达感激。我在今天被你救下性命的人中募捐了一番。我们想送你一桶油和一捆象牙。这是我们过去数月劳作的收获，但若我们的舰船被海盗夺去，这些便毫无意义。

英文原文: {VALUE}% to night spotting range penalty on campaign map.
中文译文: {VALUE}% 战役地图夜间视野范围惩罚

英文原文: The air is stifling. I hope you've been letting the captives up on deck? No signs of disease?
中文译文: 空气沉闷。你让俘虏上甲板透气了吗？没有疾病的迹象吧？

英文原文: You can only view ships at the port while your fleet is away.
中文译文: 舰队外出时，你只能在港口查看舰船。

英文原文: By my blood… Damn, that hurts. I think I'm all right, though. Thank you.
中文译文: 以我的血起誓……该死，真疼。不过我想我没事。谢谢你。

英文原文: encouraging lords to maintain powerful warships.
中文译文: 鼓励领主维持强大的舰船。

英文原文: Listen. I have enjoyed our excursion, and hunting pirates is always good business. Though I must depart now to Quyaz, I would like to go hunting with you again. Gunnar tells me that you will be sailing from Ostican once you locate your next quarry. Hopefully I will see you there soon.
中文译文: 听着。我很享受这次远航，猎杀海盗总是好买卖。虽然我现在必须前往库亚兹，但我希望能再与你一同狩猎。贡纳尔告诉我，一旦你找到下一个目标，就会从奥斯蒂坎起航。希望不久后能在那里见到你。

英文原文: your uncanny ability to predict the weather.
中文译文: 你预测天气的神奇能力。

英文原文: Well respected or not, I’m ready to track him down.
中文译文: 无论是否受人尊敬，我已准备好追踪他。

英文原文: providing towns with finances to maintain small coastal squadrons
中文译文: 为城镇提供资金以维持小型海岸分舰队

英文原文: That awful night... I awoke to cries and screaming and smoke. Father and mother... I won't speak of it. Some of those villains grabbed me and threw me over a horse. In the camp I saw our little brother, and my heart sank, but I did not see you, and that gave me hope.
中文译文: 那个可怕的夜晚……我在哭喊、尖叫和烟雾中醒来。父亲和母亲……我不愿再提。那些恶棍中有人抓住我，把我扔到马背上。在营地里我看到了我们的小兄弟，我的心沉了下去，但我没有看到你，这给了我希望。

英文原文: Good! You dealt her ship a mortal wound. It’s going down! Now, finish off its consorts.
中文译文: 好！你给了她的舰船致命一击。它要沉了！现在，解决它的同伴。

英文原文: You won fairly, Purig. You and your men shall be put ashore.
中文译文: 你赢得公平，普里格。你和你的手下将被送上岸。

英文原文: That was a good fight! You did a fine job taking out those mangonels.
中文译文: 打得好！你干掉了那些投石机，干得漂亮。

英文原文: Swim to shore and reach your horses.
中文译文: 游向岸边，找到你的马匹。

英文原文: I'm new at this, my {?PLAYER.GENDER}lady{?}lord{\?}! I'm just a farmer who fell on hard times. I signed on with this ship in Varcheg a month ago. They told me we'd be trading grain and ivory across the Byalic. I didn't know we'd be attacking honest folk like yourselves![ib:weary]
中文译文: 我是新手，我的{?PLAYER.GENDER}莱迪{?}大人{\?}！我只是个遭遇困境的农夫。一个月前我在瓦尔切格上了这艘舰船。他们告诉我我们会穿越拜亚利克贸易谷物和象牙。我不知道我们会攻击像你们这样的老实人！[ib:weary]

英文原文: {VALUE} xp gained by each troop per hour at sea
中文译文: 每名士兵在海上每小时获得的{VALUE}经验值

英文原文: You decided to return {HERO.NAME} to her uncles alive.(+{RELATIONSHIP_REWARD} relationship with all notables in {SETTLEMENT_LINK}).
中文译文: 你决定将{HERO.NAME}活着交还给她的叔父们。（与{RELATIONSHIP_REWARD}所有要人关系+{SETTLEMENT_LINK}）。

英文原文: {VALUE}% to duration of disorganized state while at sea.
中文译文: 海上混乱状态持续时间{VALUE}%。

英文原文: I don't like just to sit here idly. Maybe I can come aboard and inspect some of the captives? I can conclude the deal more quickly when your master arrives, and let him get back to his hunting.
中文译文: 我不喜欢就这么干坐着。也许我可以上船检查一下俘虏？等你的主人来了，我能更快地谈妥交易，让他回去继续打猎。

英文原文: Into the water! Let's go, while Purig's men are distracted. Swim fast, but keep your distance from any lookouts.
中文译文: 下水！趁普里格的人分心，我们走。游快点，但离那些瞭望手远点。

英文原文: {VALUE} fishing boat produced by each coastal settlement.
中文译文: 每个沿海定居点生产{VALUE}艘渔船。

英文原文: {VALUE}% chance per hour of campaign time to catch fish while sailing on campaign map.
中文译文: 在塞尔地图上航行时，每小时有{VALUE}%几率捕到鱼。

英文原文: Our longship is ready. If you can join me, then we should set out as soon as you are ready.
中文译文: 我们的长船准备好了。如果你能加入我，那我们就等你准备好就出发。

英文原文: Well, {PLAYER.NAME}... Alas, you appear to have made some enemies here. I do not know if what they say is true, and at any rate, I will never raise a hand against you. But I do not think it is good for you to stay here just now.
中文译文: 唉，{PLAYER.NAME}……看来你在这里树敌不少。我不知道他们说的是否属实，无论如何，我绝不会对你动手。但我认为你现在不宜久留。

英文原文: When you leave story mode, you will be returned to Ostican. You can speak to Gunnar in port to try again later. Do you wish to continue?
中文译文: 离开故事模式后，你将返回奥斯蒂坎。你可以到左舷与贡纳尔交谈，稍后再试。是否继续？

英文原文: You grew up amidst the bustling chaos of a Norse market town, a hub of trade where goods from across the known world exchanged hands. Your family were established traders, perhaps dealing in furs, amber, crafted goods, or even imported luxuries. You learned the art of negotiation, the value of different commodities, and the diverse languages and customs of the merchants who passed through. The market was your school, and shrewd dealing your lesson.
中文译文: 你在北欧市集的喧嚣混乱中长大，那里是贸易枢纽，来自已知世界的货物在此交易。你的家族是世代商人，或许经营毛皮、琥珀、工艺品，甚至进口奢侈品。你学会了谈判的技巧，懂得不同商品的价值，以及往来商人的多样语言和习俗。市场就是你的学堂，精明交易便是你的课程。

英文原文: {VALUE}% to production of walrus ivory and whale oil at villages of the governed settlement.
中文译文: 统治定居点的村庄沃尔鲁斯号象牙和鲸油产量+{VALUE}%。

英文原文: The edict requires inland towns to support coastal settlements with materials and trained workmen.
中文译文: 该法令要求内陆城镇向沿海定居点提供材料和熟练工匠。

英文原文: I accept your gift. Let us return to Ostican.
中文译文: 我接受你的礼物。我们归航奥斯蒂坎吧。

英文原文: Our timbers are groaning like a sick man.
中文译文: 我们的船骨呻吟得像病汉一样。

英文原文: {VALUE} xp gained by each troop once per day when entering storms
中文译文: 进入风暴时，每个部队每天获得{VALUE}经验值。

英文原文: Steer the ship to save the crewmen in the water.
中文译文: 掌舵舰船，营救落水船员。

英文原文: My instructions were clear. No one aboard the ship.
中文译文: 我的指令很清楚：舰船上一人不留。

英文原文: Yes, I buy slaves. They work my sulfur mines. Sulfur is valuable, and if I did not mine it another would. Anyway, these islands are part of no kingdom and I am violating no law. Since when does a pirate like yourself care about such things?
中文译文: 是的，我拜奴隶。他们为我开采硫矿。硫磺很值钱，我不采别人也会采。反正这些岛屿不属于任何国王，我没有违反任何法律。像你这样的海盗，什么时候关心起这些事了？

英文原文: You spent your adolescence helping out at the bustling docks, assisting with the loading and unloading of ships, and learning the ins and outs of maritime trade. You witnessed the arrival and departure of exotic goods and people from far-off lands, fueling your dreams of adventure on the high seas.
中文译文: 你的少年时代在繁忙的码头度过，帮忙装卸舰船，学习海上贸易的里里外外。你目睹了来自遥远国度的奇货与异民往来不绝，点燃了你对远洋冒险的梦想。

英文原文: You two snatched their ship right out from under their noses! A fine story to tell my brothers, if we survive this.
中文译文: 你们两个居然在他们眼皮底下把舰船抢走了！要是我们能活下来，这倒是个跟兄弟们吹嘘的好故事。
沃尔鲁斯图斯克猎手团

英文原文: I’ve been making some inquiries. Crusas is well-known and respected in the Empire and in Vlandia. He mines sulfur from islands in the Gulf of Charas. No doubt he uses some of Purig’s slaves, but I guess the grand lords and ladies don’t know that, or choose not to know.
中文译文: 我一直在打听。克鲁萨斯在帝国和弗兰迪亚都很有名望。他在查拉斯湾的岛屿上开采硫磺。无疑他用了一些普里格的奴隶，但我想那些大贵族们要么不知道，要么装作不知道。

英文原文: {VALUE}% xp gain after each battle for mariner troops under character's command.
中文译文: {VALUE}% xp gain after each battle for mariner troops under character's command.
豪恩德奥夫迪阿瑟沃尔德号
劫掠时获得20%劫掠速度加成。

英文原文: Locate the Vlandian merchant ship in the waters off {SETTLEMENT_LINK}.
中文译文: 在{SETTLEMENT_LINK}附近海域找到瓦兰迪亚商船。

英文原文: Greetings, {PLAYERNAME}... I’ve got my longship, Corpse-Maker, and more of my brothers may yet join us on the journey. We also brought a captured vessel, agile and light, which mounts a ballista. We call it the Golden Wasp. We’ve bought up most of the ale in Ostican for our voyage, as I think we’ll be heading for the sweltering seas of the south.
中文译文: 向你致敬，{PLAYERNAME}……我带来了我的长船“造尸者”，更多的兄弟或许会在途中加入。我们还带了一艘俘获的舰船，轻快敏捷，装有一架巴利斯塔。我们称之为“戈尔登瓦斯普号”。我们在奥斯蒂坎买下了大部分麦酒，因为我想我们即将前往南方那酷热的海洋。

英文原文: Get the men to their ships. We sail at once.
中文译文: 让弟兄们上舰船。我们即刻塞尔。

英文原文: Sail to within hailing distance of the Sea Hound ship.
中文译文: 塞尔至“西霍恩德团”号舰船的喊话距离内。

英文原文: Merely a chance to fight those slaving bastards.
中文译文: 不过是个与那些奴隶贩子杂种战斗的机会。

英文原文: Your family transports goods and people along the river, facing the dangers of strong currents and occasional banditry. You grew up learning to navigate the treacherous waters and to defend yourself from those who would prey on the river traffic.
中文译文: 你的家族沿河运送货物和人员，面对湍急的水流和偶尔的匪患。你从小学习在险恶水域中航行，并保护自己免受那些觊觎河运之人的侵害。

英文原文: The sea hounds and I have history, and nowadays they hate my guts as fiercely as I hate theirs. Somebody must have sent word of my whereabouts to their local friends as these lowlifes had a mind to do me in. Again, you have my thanks for evening the odds.
中文译文: 我与西霍恩德团们有旧怨，如今他们恨我入骨，正如我恨他们一样。一定是有人把我的行踪透露给了他们当地的同伙，这些下贱胚子便想置我于死地。再次感谢你帮我扭转了局势。

英文原文: You manage to put some distance between you and your enemies, and you have a moment to consider how to proceed.
中文译文: 你成功与敌人拉开了一段距离，得以稍作喘息，思考下一步行动。

英文原文: None of your ships are docked at this port.
中文译文: 此港口没有停靠你的任何舰船。

英文原文: Well… Normally I'd say we put as much distance between us and Purig as quickly as we can, but those merchants are still out there floundering in the waves. We can't leave them there. I can get the sail up. Take the steering oar. Let's see if we can't get them out of the water.
中文译文: 嗯……通常我会说我们应尽快远离普里格，但那些商人还在海浪中挣扎。我们不能丢下他们。我来升帆。你掌舵。看看能不能把他们救上来。
阿森纳尔斯·奥夫·斯泰特

英文原文: You can't start parley while at sea.

We should get more information on this Omor silver. If we can stop these Vlandians it would deal a great blow to Purig, and we could possibly find out more about this northern anchorage, his captives, and maybe your sister.
中文译文: 我们应该多了解一些关于奥莫尔白银的情报。如果能阻止这些瓦兰迪亚人，将给普里格沉重一击，我们或许还能查明北方锚地、他的俘虏，以及你姐妹的下落。

英文原文: The enemy has captured your ship!
Find the corsair {HERO.NAME} and defeat her.
You failed to defend the Vlandian merchants.
中文译文: 你未能保护弗兰迪安商贾团。

英文原文: {VALUE}% to skeleton crew requirement for any ship in party
中文译文: {VALUE}% to skeleton crew requirement for any ship in party

英文原文: {VALUE}% Increase to militia veterancy in coastal settlements.
中文译文: {VALUE}% Increase to militia veterancy in coastal settlements.

英文原文: I am honored, but I cannot take on your companions.
中文译文: 我深感荣幸，但我不能接受你的同伴。

英文原文: If you wish to weaken these sea hounds, you may want to strike at their allies first. And of course the elders of Quyaz will be most happy to pay a handsome reward, of which you and Gunnar would receive your fair share.
中文译文: 若你欲削弱这些西霍恩德团，不妨先打击其盟友。当然，库亚兹的长老们将非常乐意支付丰厚酬劳，你与贡纳尔自会得到应得的一份。

英文原文: Get to the Sturgian ship. There may be enemies nearby.
中文译文: 前往斯特吉亚人的舰船。附近可能有敌人。

英文原文: {VALUE}% damage to hulls of enemy ships dealt by ballista.
中文译文: {VALUE}% damage to hulls of enemy ships dealt by ballista.

英文原文: Lead your fleet into battle and defeat your foes.
中文译文: 率领你的舰队投入战斗，击败敌人。
弗兰迪安商贾团已被消灭。

英文原文: You'd have been twice the tyrant that Volbjorn was.
中文译文: 你本会成为比沃尔比约恩更甚的暴君。

英文原文: {VALUE}% melee damage dealt by crew armed with two-handed weapons.
中文译文: {VALUE}% 双手武器船员造成的近战伤害。

英文原文: Look - there's two of them giving chase. We'll have to take one down quickly, and hope the Vlandians can hold the other off until we reach them.
中文译文: 看——有两艘船在追击我们。我们必须迅速夺取一艘，并希望瓦兰迪亚人能拖住另一艘，直到我们赶到。

英文原文: You talked to {HERO.NAME}, and agreed to pilot a fireship and help the Sturgians run the Sea Hound blockade.
中文译文: 你与{HERO.NAME}交谈，同意驾驶火船，帮助斯特吉亚人突破西豪恩德号的封锁。

英文原文: Clans with a heavy ship gain +1 influence daily.{newline}Clans possessing no heavy or medium ships lose -1 influence daily
中文译文: 拥有赫维号的家族每日获得+1影响力。{newline}没有赫维号或米迪厄姆的家族每日失去-1影响力。
艾尔戈瑟尔迈塞尔夫号

英文原文: Gunnar says to return after the siege is over.
中文译文: 贡纳尔说等围城结束后再回来。

英文原文: I'll repay your treachery in your own coin. Finish him, lads!
中文译文: 我会以牙还牙，回报你的背叛。干掉他，兄弟们！

英文原文: {PLAYER.NAME}... {?PLAYER.GENDER}Sister{?}Brother{\?}... Heaven's mercy, I had given up hope. I thought I'd die in that dark place, in the power of those cruel men.
中文译文: {PLAYER.NAME}……{?PLAYER.GENDER}姐妹{?}兄弟{\?}……天哪，我已放弃希望。我以为会死在那黑暗之地，受那些残暴之徒的掌控。

英文原文: {PLAYER.NAME}! It's now or never! Go, cut those bastards down!
Do you want to go to Ostican right away?
中文译文: 你想立刻前往奥斯蒂坎吗？

英文原文: If all our ships row in together, we’d be presenting enough targets that we’re bound to get hit. So let’s not do that. Here’s another idea…
中文译文: 若我们所有舰船齐头并进，就会暴露太多目标，必然挨打。所以别那么做。我另有主意……

英文原文: You’ve got a message from those curs? Out with it, then. What’s your message?
中文译文: 那些狗东西给你带了消息？那就说吧。你的消息是什么？

英文原文: Good. Then we will take your ship. It has fine lines and expensive fittings, and I have no doubt that Purig, who has an eye for costly things, would recognize it instantly
中文译文: 好。那我们就夺取你的舰船。它线条优美，配件昂贵，我毫不怀疑普里格——那个对贵重之物眼光独到的家伙——会一眼认出它。

英文原文: Do you see that big cluster of ships back there? That's got to be where they're holding the prisoners.
中文译文: 你看到后面那大群舰船了吗？那一定就是关押俘虏的霍尔德号。

英文原文: Ha! It looks like her ship took a lot of damage. Her crew must not have furled the sails properly before the winds hit, and now she’s just limping along. Sink her!
中文译文: 哈！看来她的舰船受损严重。她的船员肯定没在温德号来之前收好塞尔，现在只能蹒跚前行。击沉她！

英文原文: For a brief moment, your captors seem to have forgotten about you, offering you a chance to break free from your shackles.
中文译文: 短暂间，看守似乎忘了你，给了你挣脱镣铐的机会。

英文原文: You promised {HERO.NAME} his life if he helped you capture Purig's prisoner ship. (+{HONOR_BONUS_AMOUNT} honor bonus)
中文译文: 你承诺若{HERO.NAME}帮你俘获普里格的囚船，便饶他一命。（+{HONOR_BONUS_AMOUNT}荣誉奖励）

英文原文: You're strolling through {SETTLEMENT}{.o} streets when you hear raised voices coming from a side alley. You turn to look, and see three rough-looking men accosting an older man in a cloak. His gaze shifts quickly from one to the other and his body is tensed, as though he is going to spring into action. You sense a fight is about to start.
中文译文: 你漫步在{SETTLEMENT}{.o}的街道上，忽闻侧巷传来高声争吵。你转头望去，只见三个粗野之人正围住一位披斗篷的老者。老者目光迅速扫视三人，身体紧绷，似要随时出手。你预感一场打斗即将开始。

英文原文: Raised on Aserai dhows, your father thought you about the trade winds and routes. The ship you were raised in made long and tedious voyages, smuggling silks and spices or ambushing Vlandian ships when profits dwindled.
中文译文: 你在阿塞莱三角帆船上长大，父亲教你信风与航路。你成长的舰船从事漫长而乏味的航行，走私丝绸与香料，或在利润微薄时伏击瓦兰迪亚人的舰船。

英文原文: This must be the slave colony that Fahda mentioned. Pirates value safe havens to build new ships. With an anchorage like that, Purig can have the Sea Hounds out of his hands.
中文译文: 这一定是法赫达提到的奴隶殖民地。海盗需要安全港来建造新舰船。有了这样的锚地，普里格就能将西霍恩德团掌控在手中。

英文原文: Get us close so we can board.

Your family lived by the water, skilled in casting nets, setting lines, and mending the wear and tear of daily fishing. You understood the currents, the seasons of the fish, and the importance of a good catch for your community. Life was dictated by the river's flow and its bounty.
中文译文: 你的家族依水而居，精通撒网、布线和修补日常渔获的磨损。你了解水流、鱼类的季节，以及好收成对社区的重要性。生活由河流的流淌及其恩赐所主宰。

英文原文: It was an honorable thing, to duel him, and I am glad you kept your word to him, though he did not deserve it. For my part, though, I owe him nothing. I will continue to hunt him, and as it is much easier for him to evade a large group than a single hunter, I will do so alone.
中文译文: 与他决斗是一件荣誉之事，我很高兴你对他信守承诺，尽管他不配。但对我来说，我对他毫无亏欠。我会继续追猎他，而他躲避一大群人比躲避一个猎人容易得多，所以我将独自行动。

英文原文: Listen - these Sea Hounds are trolls and demons, not men! I want no part of this any more! Spare me, and I promise I'll go back to my old life.
中文译文: 听着——这些西霍恩德团是巨魔和恶魔，不是人！我不想再掺和了！饶了我吧，我保证回到过去的生活。

英文原文: {VALUE}% morale boost for crew while on own ship.
中文译文: 船员在自己舰船上时士气提升{VALUE}%。

英文原文: Think nothing of it, lads. You'd have done the same for any of us, one sailor for another.
中文译文: 别放在心上，伙计们。你们也会为我们中的任何人做同样的事，水手之间理应如此。

英文原文: {SISTER.NAME}, I just need you to be patient and strong a little longer.
中文译文: {SISTER.NAME}，我只需要你再忍耐坚强一会儿。

英文原文: You grew up amidst tales of legendary sea battles and legendary heroes, destined to carry on the proud traditions of your seafaring ancestors and defend your coastal towns just like them. You learned the skills of a mariner, a rower, and a warrior.
中文译文: 你在传奇海战与英雄的传说中长大，注定要继承航海先祖的光荣传统，像他们一样保卫你的沿海城镇。你学会了马里纳号、桨手和战士的技能。

英文原文: establishing arsenals to stockpile naval supplies.
中文译文: 建立军械库以储备海军补给。

英文原文: As I told you, we fought together against old king Volbjorn. Many of us were from Beinland and other parts of the Nordvyg where even the jarls tread lightly. A man who called himself our 'king' - well, we weren't having any of that. We didn't call ourselves the Sea Hounds back then, but we flew the dogs-head banner, to show our loyalty to each other and to our cause.
中文译文: 正如我告诉你的，我们曾一起对抗老科农格沃尔比约恩。我们中许多人来自贝因兰和诺德维格的其他地方，那里连雅尔们都小心翼翼。一个自称我们‘科农格’的人——我们可不吃那一套。那时我们还不自称西霍恩德团，但我们悬挂狗头旗，以示对彼此和事业的忠诚。

英文原文: {VALUE}% melee damage taken by crew while on own ships.
中文译文: 船员在自己舰船上时受到的近战伤害减少{VALUE}%。

英文原文: served as a deckhand on a corsair.
中文译文: 曾在海盗船上担任德克水手。

英文原文: Are you all right? One on three aren't the worst odds I've faced, but even so, that could have gone either way. I owe you my thanks.
中文译文: 你还好吗？以一敌三并非我面对过的最糟局面，但即便如此，结果仍难预料。我欠你一声感谢。

英文原文: You bid farewell to Gunnar. He returned to his home in Lagshofn, in Beinland, where hopes that some day you might visit him. Your sister, recovered from her ordeal, stands ready to join you and the rest of your clan as you continue to forge your destiny in Calradia.
中文译文: 你向贡纳尔道别。他返回贝因兰拉格斯霍芬的家中，希望有朝一日你能去探望他。你的姐妹从磨难中恢复，准备加入你和你的家族，继续在卡拉迪亚锻造你们的命运。

英文原文: I am no pirate, but a liberator. I intend to free your captives.
中文译文: 我不是海盗，而是解放者。我打算释放你们的俘虏。
角色造成的近战伤害增加{VALUE}%。

英文原文: {VALUE}% melee damage dealt by character when fighting on other ships.
中文译文: {VALUE}% 角色在其他舰船上战斗时造成的近战伤害。

英文原文: Order the men to their ships. We sail at once.
中文译文: 命令士兵登船。我们即刻塞尔。

英文原文: Ahoy to you, Bjolgur! And ahoy to you, Lahar! She is indeed safe, with us. But now it looks like the whole pack of Hounds are coming baying out to meet us. You two brave fellows get on our flanks, and we'll meet them prow to prow
中文译文: 向你致敬，比奥尔古尔！也向你致敬，拉哈尔！她确实安全，与我们同在。但现在看来，整群豪恩德号正狂吠着向我们扑来。你们两位勇士到我们侧翼，我们迎头而上。

英文原文: crewed a galley in the coastal raids.
中文译文: 曾在沿海袭击中担任桨帆船船员。

英文原文: All is good? Packed your bag, kissed your mother and your sweetheart good-bye? Of course my lads and I won't mind if you want to tarry here a little longer. Oh no. There's no hurry at all.
中文译文: 都准备好了？收拾好行囊，跟母亲和心上人吻别了？当然，我和我的兄弟们不介意你再多待一会儿。哦不，一点都不急。

英文原文: It is. We're here to rescue you! Just... Keep your voice low.
中文译文: 正是。我们来救你了！只是……压低声音。

英文原文: {VALUE}% melee damage taken by crew while on enemy ships.
中文译文: {VALUE}% 船员在敌舰船上受到的近战伤害。

英文原文: You and Gunnar offered to escort a Vlandian merchantman on its homeward voyage from Beinland, hoping that its rich cargo would entice the Sea Hounds into battle. You were not disappointed. Together with the merchants you defeated the attackers, dealing the Sea Hounds a heavy blow.
中文译文: 你和贡纳尔提议护送一艘瓦兰迪亚商船从贝因兰返航，希望其丰厚货物能引诱西霍恩德团出战。你们并未失望。与商人联手击败了袭击者，给西霍恩德团以重创。

英文原文: Some of our number never showed up at the battle, however. I can imagine how it went for them after that - mocked in taverns or in scraps of songs sung by children.
中文译文: 然而，我们中有些人从未在战场上现身。我能想象他们之后的下场——在酒馆中被嘲笑，或成为孩童歌谣中的笑柄。

英文原文: {VALUE}% bonus when crew is sent to confront pirates.
中文译文: {VALUE}% 派遣船员对抗海盗时的加成。

英文原文: So then… I believe I have heard of you. {PLAYER.NAME}? Purig spoke of you. From what I know, I think I can be of use to you. Do we have a bargain? I tell you what I know, and you give my freedom.
中文译文: 那么……我想我听说过你。{PLAYER.NAME}？普里格提起过你。据我所知，我想我能帮上你的忙。我们成交吗？我告诉你我所知道的，你给我吉夫号。

英文原文: Greetings. Listen… When we sailed with Purig, I was hoping that he would help me fight the Sea Hounds near Hvalvik. His betrayal of course has cost us time, but I think that plan is still a good one.
中文译文: 你好。听着……当我们与普里格塞尔时，我曾希望他能帮我攻打瓦尔维克附近的西霍恩德团。他的背叛当然让我们损失了时间，但我认为那个计划仍然不错。

英文原文: There’s two more of them over there. Let’s go fish them out.
中文译文: 那边还有两个。我们去把他们捞出来。

英文原文: +30% more loot from villages, villagers and caravans.
中文译文: 从村庄、村民和商队获得的战利品增加30%。

英文原文: I am {PLAYER.NAME}. Gunnar sent me. We were in a fight.
中文译文: 我是{PLAYER.NAME}。贡纳尔派我来的。我们打了一仗。

英文原文: You and I, meanwhile, shall dive off the side of our ship, swim round to the stern of the prisoner ship, and climb up the side. Then together we can try to find your sister on board. Once we succeed, well, we'll just have to figure it out from there.
中文译文: 与此同时，你和我从船侧跳下，游到囚船船尾，攀爬而上。然后我们一起在船上寻找你的姐妹。一旦成功，嗯，我们再随机应变。

英文原文: Production in coastal settlement workshops and their bounded villages is increased by 25%{newline}Settlement project building speed in non-coastal towns is decreased by 20%
中文译文: 沿海定居点工坊及其附属村庄的生产提高25%{newline}非沿海城镇的定居点项目建造速度降低20%

英文原文: served as a shieldbearer to a huscarl.
中文译文: 曾担任胡斯卡尔的盾卫。

英文原文: We won, and now I wish to join you against our common enemy.
中文译文: 我们赢了，现在我愿加入你，对抗我们共同的敌人。

英文原文: {?PLAYER.GENDER}Sister{?}Brother{\?}! Heaven's mercy! What are you doing here?[rf:convo_relaxed_happy]
中文译文: {?PLAYER.GENDER}姐妹{?}兄弟{\?}！天哪！你在这里做什么？[rf:convo_relaxed_happy]

英文原文: {VALUE}% to ranged damage suffered by character while steering the ship.
中文译文: {VALUE}% 角色掌舵时受到的远程伤害。

英文原文: Hah! We went through their net like a slippery old eel. Bjolgur and Lahar are right over there. Let's turn the tables on those bastards!
中文译文: 哈！我们像条滑溜的老鳗鱼一样穿过了他们的网。比奥尔古尔和拉哈尔就在那边。让我们扭转局势，教训那些混蛋！

英文原文: You should come see me in my village, Lagshofn. It's on the east coast of Beinland. It's not much, not for a {?PLAYER.GENDER}warrior{?}man{\?} like you, who's no doubt seen all the wonders of the Empire and the lands beyond, but we can pass a summer's night on the beach and drink to our deeds.
中文译文: 你应该来我的村庄拉格斯霍芬看看。它在贝因兰东海岸。虽然不算什么，配不上像你这样的{?PLAYER.GENDER}勇士{?}男人{\?}，你无疑见识过帝国及远方的所有奇观，但我们可以在海滩上度过一个夏夜，为我们的功绩痛饮。

英文原文: If you don’t play us false, we’ll have mercy on you. (+{HONOR_BONUS_AMOUNT} Honor Bonus)
中文译文: 若你不背叛我们，我们便饶你一命。（+{HONOR_BONUS_AMOUNT}荣誉加成）

英文原文: Guard a Vlandian merchant ship sailing home from Beinland.
中文译文: 护卫一艘从贝因兰返航的瓦兰迪亚商船。

英文原文: I thought he'd order me cut open, or flayed, but instead Volbjorn laughed and told me that he liked my mettle. He'd spare my life, and the lives of the rest of my comrades, so long as I swore an oath not to take up arms against him again. Volbjorn had made his point with a dozen headless bodies at his feet, and men paying the land-tax or serving in his armies were of more value to him than corpses. If I swore, a hundred of my comrades could return to their families. So I swore.
中文译文: 我以为他会下令将我开膛或剥皮，但沃尔比约恩却大笑起来，说他欣赏我的胆色。只要我发誓不再与他兵戎相见，他就饶我一命，也饶过我其余战友的性命。沃尔比约恩用脚下十几具无头尸体表明了立场——对他而言，缴纳土地税或在他军中服役的人比尸体更有价值。若我发誓，一百名战友就能回家团聚。于是我发了誓。

英文原文: My sister... What you must have gone through...
中文译文: 我的姐妹……你究竟经历了什么……

英文原文: The wind is blowing against us. Best furl the sail.
How do I know that telling you about the Sea Hounds will save my life?
中文译文: 我怎知告诉你西霍恩德团的事就能活命？

英文原文: Throughout your travels, you overheard hushed conversations about a new menace, a pirate confederacy terrorizing the coasts of Calradia. These northern corsairs have built a reputation for trading in captives from bandits and raiders such as the ones who attacked your family. Do you want to go to Ostican now to try to pick up your sister's trail and embark on an hunt across the seas of Calradia?
中文译文: 旅途中，你无意间听到一些低声交谈，谈及一个新的威胁——一个令卡拉迪亚沿海闻风丧胆的海盗联盟。这些北方海盗以贩卖俘虏闻名，俘虏来自袭击你家族的匪徒和掠夺者。你是否想现在前往奥斯蒂坎，追寻你姐妹的踪迹，踏上横跨卡拉迪亚诸海的猎杀之旅？

英文原文: Impale shields with thrown javelins, and throwing axes deals damage after if they break a shield.
中文译文: 投掷标枪可刺穿盾牌，若击碎盾牌，投掷斧随后造成伤害。

英文原文: {NUMBER} troops will spend {DAYS} {?DAYS > 1}days{?}day{\?} to deliver the ship and return to your party.
中文译文: {NUMBER}名士兵将花费{DAYS}{?DAYS > 1}天{?}天{\?}交付舰船并返回你的队伍。

英文原文: No! No! If you board that monster we’re finished! Cut loose!
中文译文: 不！不！你要是登上那怪物我们就完了！砍断缆绳！

英文原文: See, the {SETTLEMENT_LINK} merchants promised us a hoard of silver to protect their ships from the Sea Hounds, but it never arrived. I was sent down to learn what was going on, and I find the silver just sitting here, loaded onto a ship in the harbor, and the Sturgians are burning through it paying their men double wages not to run off. Some Vlandian pirates were sighted in the estuary, and the Sturgians refuse to venture out.
中文译文: 你看，{SETTLEMENT_LINK}商人许诺给我们一大笔银子，让我们保护他们的舰船免受西霍恩德团侵扰，但银子从未送到。我被派下来了解情况，却发现银子就堆在这里，装在一艘港口的舰船上，而斯特吉亚人正挥霍着它，给手下双倍军饷以防他们逃跑。河口发现了弗兰迪安海盗团，斯特吉亚人不敢出海。
阿姆内斯蒂斯·福尔·派雷茨

英文原文: {VALUE} to command limit of ships in battle.

“A ship! A ship!” calls out one of your lookouts. You can see it too - a square sail, outlined against the steel-gray northern sky. One the Sea Hounds has spotted you, and thinks to make you its prey.
中文译文: “船！有船！”你的一个瞭望手喊道。你也看见了——一张方塞尔，映在钢灰色的北方天空下。一头西霍恩德团发现了你，将你视为猎物。

英文原文: I do not know for sure. If I had ever knowingly given him insult, I never would have sailed on his ship.
中文译文: 我不确定。若我明知冒犯过他，绝不会登上他的舰船。

英文原文: I think the Vlandians are about to be overtaken and boarded.
中文译文: 我看瓦兰迪亚人就要被追上并登船了。

英文原文: You are in no place to speak of bargains.
The lines are holding! At them, lads!
中文译文: 缆绳撑住了！上啊，小子们！

英文原文: Don't worry - we just want to talk to you.
中文译文: 别担心——我们只是想和你谈谈。

英文原文: Welcome to {SETTLEMENT_LINK}, friend. Is that grizzled fellow with you, coming up now, is that my old comrade Gunnar of Lagshofn? A bit greyer than I remember from the days when we stood together in the shield wall facing Volbjorn's host, but, well, aren't we all…
中文译文: 欢迎来到{SETTLEMENT_LINK}，朋友。那个正走来的灰发汉子，可是我的老战友，拉格斯霍芬的贡纳尔？比我记忆中我们并肩站在盾墙前面对沃尔比约恩大军时苍老了些，不过，谁不是呢……
他们正在登上瓦兰迪亚人的船！

英文原文: You... You and {QUEST_5_COMPANION.NAME} have been slaughtering my allies all up and down this coast, and now it comes to this.
中文译文: 你……你和{QUEST_5_COMPANION.NAME}在这片海岸上屠戮我的盟友，如今终于轮到你了。

英文原文: Unless you want to swim back, I suggest we keep moving!
中文译文: 除非你想游回去，否则我建议继续前进！

英文原文: This is his ship, but he's away. Should be back shortly, though - we signalled him. Keep your distance for now.
中文译文: 这是他的舰船，但他不在。应该很快回来——我们给他发了信号。先保持距离。

英文原文: I have other obligations, and I already know how to handle a ship. (Skip tutorial)
中文译文: 我另有要事，且已通晓操舰船之术。（跳过教程）

英文原文: The ruling clan collects a 15% commission on ransom payments to other clans.
中文译文: 统治家族对其他家族支付的赎金抽取15%的佣金。

英文原文: The lady Fahda has reportedly joined up with these Sea Hounds, as pirates often band together. She has been prowling about the Gulf of Charas, taking Quyazi vessels. You wish to continue hunting Sea Hounds, do you not? Those would be good waters in which to hunt, and if you are going there, I would like to come with you and lend my assistance.
中文译文: 据说法赫达莱迪已与这些西霍恩德团合流——海盗们常结伙而行。她一直在查拉斯湾附近游荡，劫掠库亚兹的船只。您想继续追猎西霍恩德团，不是吗？那片水域正是狩猎的好去处。若您前往，我愿随行相助。

英文原文: I'm not interested in Purig's lies, just how to find him.
中文译文: 我对普里格的谎言不感兴趣，只想知道如何找到他。

英文原文: And I repeat: speak the full truth, and we might.
中文译文: 我再重复一遍：说出全部真相，我们或许会。

英文原文: We are grateful for your help. We shall meet you back in Ostican.
中文译文: 感谢您的帮助。我们在奥斯蒂坎再见。

英文原文: I'm sure Purig could wreak a great deal of wickedness with this silver in his hands, and I would very much like to foil this plan of his.
中文译文: 我确信普里格若得到这笔银子，必会为非作歹。我极想挫败他的阴谋。

英文原文: You have heard that bandits might be selling captives to pirates on the Vlandian coast, and the port of {SETTLEMENT} might be a good place to start.
中文译文: 你听闻有匪徒可能向瓦兰迪亚海岸的海盗出售俘虏，而{SETTLEMENT}港或许是个不错的起点。

英文原文: {VALUE} influence gained for each ship built in the governed settlement.
中文译文: 在管辖定居点每建造一艘舰船，获得{VALUE}影响力。
我明白。愿上天保佑你，{?PLAYER.GENDER}姐妹{?}兄弟{\?}！

英文原文: {SETTLEMENT_LINK} is linked to the Byalic Sea by a wide estuary. It would be easy for the pirates to sit there, like spiders in a web, and wait until the Sturgians despair of losing all their commerce and try to run the blockade. Then the Vlandians will snap up the ships and their treasure.
中文译文: {SETTLEMENT_LINK}通过宽阔的河口与拜亚里克海相连。海盗们极易盘踞于此，如蛛网待猎，坐等斯特吉亚人因商路断绝而绝望，试图冲破封锁。届时瓦兰迪亚人便会一举夺舰船掠宝。

英文原文: Who dares provoke the Hounds in their lair? Is that you, {QUEST_5_COMPANION.NAME}? You and your companion? I will fall upon you like an eagle and tear out your livers, I will shatter your ships to splinters!
中文译文: 谁敢在猎犬巢穴中挑衅？是你吗，{QUEST_5_COMPANION.NAME}？你与你的同伴？我必如鹰隼般扑下，撕出你们的肝脏，将你们的舰船砸成碎片！

英文原文: What will you bring on our hunt?
Well, {PLAYER.NAME}... Your sister is free, thank the gods. You gave Purig the death he deserved. None will mourn him.
中文译文: 嗯，{PLAYER.NAME}……你的姐妹自由了，感谢诸神。你给了普里格应得的死亡。无人会悼念他。

英文原文: I am one of Purig's longtime customers, and I am in a bit of a hurry. I made arrangements weeks ago to buy his merchandise. How long is Purig going to be? Can I come aboard?
中文译文: 我是普里格的老主顾，而且有点赶时间。几周前我就安排好了要买他的货。普里格还要多久？我能上船吗？

英文原文: I'm going to take this ship, and get you to safety.
中文译文: 我要夺取这艘舰船，带你到安全之处。

英文原文: I am ready to set out.
中文译文: 我已准备就绪，随时可以出发。

英文原文: Enhances your personal combat prowess during naval engagements and bolsters your effectiveness in leading troops and employing tactics in sea battles.
中文译文: 提升你在海战中的个人战斗技艺，并增强你率领部队及运用战术的效能。

英文原文: Well done! But your sister is still within, and we need to get her to safety. Cut the lines tying us to the other ship, and let's be away.
中文译文: 干得好！但你的姐妹还在里面，我们得带她脱险。砍断连接我们与敌舰船的缆绳，我们这就离开。

英文原文: I would never have given up trying to rescue you, or our little brother or any of us!
中文译文: 我绝不会放弃营救你，或是我们的弟弟，或是我们中的任何人！

英文原文: Well... Here we are. Ready to set sail for Angranfjord and settle accounts with our enemies, once and for all. Lahar will sail with us, and Bjolgur, and more of his brothers may join us at our destination. We have Crusas' ship – and Crusas too of course, much as he might not like it – and hopefully the element of surprise. We just need to consider how to turn this best to our advantage.
中文译文: 嗯……我们到了。准备启航前往安格兰菲尤尔德，与敌人彻底清算旧账。拉哈尔将与我们一起航行，比奥尔古尔也是，他的更多兄弟可能会在目的地加入我们。我们还有克鲁萨斯的舰船——当然还有克鲁萨斯本人，尽管他可能不太乐意——但愿还能出其不意。我们只需考虑如何将这一切化为最大优势。

英文原文: A friendly ship has started to sink!
中文译文: 一艘友方舰船开始沉没！

英文原文: Ah, gods - I see more of them coming up... No rest for my sword-arm today!
中文译文: 啊，诸神——我又看到更多敌船逼近……今日我的剑臂不得歇息！
解救西霍恩德团的俘虏

英文原文: He told me the whole story. Apparently, you had taken passage with him on some voyage to the north, hoping to find and free your sister from pirates. Then, you stole his ship - or so he said. Realizing that you were a dangerous enemy, he made inquiries among his Sea Hound allies to find her. Now he keeps her as a hostage on a ship in his fleet.
